title: Senior Marketing Lead
description:
Winnie & Ethel’s Downtown Diner in Las Vegas, NV is seeking a Senior Marketing Lead to join our team in a part-time capacity (~20 hours per week). This role will focus on driving brand awareness, increasing guest traffic, and executing marketing initiatives that directly impact revenue.



Our ideal candidate is strategic, proactive, and execution-focused — someone who can take ownership of marketing efforts from planning to implementation.



???? Compensation: $7–$8/hour (based on experience)



? How to Apply

Fill out this application form:  



???? MARKETING LEAD MISSION

The Senior Marketing Lead is responsible for executing and coordinating Winnie & Ethel’s marketing initiatives across digital, in-store, and community channels. This role ensures strong brand alignment, drives guest engagement, supports revenue growth, and proactively identifies opportunities to enhance marketing performance.



???? RESPONSIBILITIES

???? Social Media & Content

Track, analyze, and report weekly social media performance

Coordinate with internal and external content teams

Conduct influencer outreach and manage partnerships

Guide and support content creation aligned with brand voice



???? Website & Brand Consistency

Maintain and update website content

Ensure all business information across platforms is accurate



???? Marketing Campaign Execution

Develop and execute campaigns (events, promotions, seasonal)

Design in-store marketing materials (flyers, table tents, posters)

Build and maintain media contact lists

Identify opportunities for press, awards, and brand exposure

Draft and pitch press releases

Coordinate with vendors (photographers, designers, etc.)

Execute
 and SMS campaigns (advanced level)

Prepare weekly marketing reports with insights



???? Guest Engagement & Brand Presence

Respond to guest reviews (Google, Yelp, OpenTable, etc.)

Manage guest inquiries across platforms 
, Instagram, etc.)

Monitor brand presence across all guest touchpoints

Coordinate influencer visits and media experiences



???? Advertising & Performance Marketing

Support execution of Google & Meta ads

Monitor performance and recommend optimizations

Assist in testing and improving paid strategies



???? COMPETENCIES

Strong brand storytelling and alignment

High ownership and proactivity

Excellent communication skills

Strong attention to detail and accuracy

Creativity and visual awareness

Ability to work independently and collaboratively

Strong organization and execution skills



???? TECHNICAL SKILLS

Social Media Platforms (Instagram,
, TikTok) – Advanced

Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive,
) – Advanced

 & SMS Marketing Platforms – Advanced

Design Tools (Canva, Adobe, etc.) – Advanced

Google & Meta Ads – Intermediate



???? QUALIFICATIONS

Marketing and social media experience required

Restaurant marketing experience preferred

Experience in high-volume or independent restaurants preferred

Strong written and verbal English communication

High attention to detail and brand consistency

Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines

Ability to work independently and collaboratively



? SCHEDULE

Part-time role

Approximately 20 hours per week (flexible based on needs)



???? COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

Hourly compensation based on experience

Performance-based bonuses (in lieu of traditional PTO)

Potential profit-sharing opportunities



???? ABOUT WINNIE & ETHEL’S

Modeled after the iconic, round-the-clock American eatery of the 1940s, Winnie & Ethel’s Downtown Diner draws upon the rich history and legacy of Las Vegas’ Huntridge Theater and neighborhood. Named after Chef Aaron Lee’s grandmother Winnie and CEO Mallory Gott’s great-grandmother Ethel, the restaurant is built on warmth, hospitality, and community.

title: GOOGLE ADS SPECIALIST (PERFORMANCE MARKETING)
description:
We are seeking a highly capable Google Ads Specialist with strong analytical thinking and a long-term commitment to performance marketing. This role is designed for candidates who not only execute campaigns but deeply understand how to drive measurable business results through data-driven advertising.



JOB DESCRIPTION



Develop strategies and execute Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, YouTube, Performance Max) aligned with business objectives

Monitor, analyze, and continuously optimize campaign performance based on key metrics such as CPA, ROAS, and conversion rate

Conduct in-depth research on customer behavior, keywords, and competitors to improve campaign effectiveness

Collaborate with Content, Design, and Sales teams to enhance user experience and maximize conversion rates

Set up tracking systems and manage data measurement tools (Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager)

Deliver detailed performance reports and propose actionable improvements based on data insights



REQUIREMENTS



Minimum of 1 year of hands-on experience running Google Ads campaigns; experience managing large budgets is a strong advantage

Strong performance marketing mindset with a solid understanding of customer journeys and conversion optimization

Proficiency in analytics and tracking tools

Ability to interpret data and make informed, data-driven decisions

High level of ownership, proactiveness, and ability to work independently under pressure

Prior experience in agency environments or high-performance projects is preferred



BENEFITS



Competitive salary based on capability and performance

Professional working environment with a strong focus on performance and results

Opportunity to manage significant budgets and work on diverse projects

Empowered to take ownership and contribute to strategic decisions

Clear career progression toward Senior or Leadership roles



APPLICATION

Please send your CV to: 

Subject line: [Google Ads Specialist] – Full Name



We prioritize candidates who are serious about their career path and committed to delivering real, measurable impact through digital advertising.

We need a reliable, detail-oriented operations assistant to handle the publishing and administrative workflow so the founder can focus on writing and strategy.

This is a part-time, ongoing role — approximately 10 hours per week with potential to grow. We are looking for someone who takes pride in accuracy and follows instructions precisely. Legal content cannot have formatting errors.

What you will do:

Format and publish articles in WordPress from supplied drafts (headings, internal links, images, alt text, Yoast SEO fields, meta descriptions — all provided or guided by an SOP)

Schedule and post Instagram content using brand templates in Canva (captions and overlay text supplied by founder)

Manage
 marketing platform (Kit/ConvertKit) — monitor subscribers, check lead magnet delivery, tag subscribers by source

Maintain a weekly analytics report in Google Sheets (website traffic, subscriber count, Instagram metrics)

Perform basic SEO maintenance (image compression, internal linking between articles, monitoring Google Search Console)

What you will NOT do:

Write, edit, or rewrite any content — the editorial voice is the founder's

Engage publicly on social media or respond to comments as the brand

Handle any client communication or sensitive data

Requirements:

Proven WordPress publishing experience — you must have formatted and published blog posts, not just "know WordPress." Please include examples or screenshots in your application.

Canva experience — creating social media graphics from existing brand templates

Strong written English — you won't write content but you need to format it accurately without introducing errors

Experience with
 marketing platforms (Kit, Mailchimp, MailerLite, or similar)

Reliable internet connection

Available during UK/European morning hours (your afternoon/evening if in the Philippines) for daily async communication and a weekly check-in call

How we work:

Communication via Slack (async, daily)

Files shared via Google Drive

15-minute weekly video check-in (first month), then fortnightly

Full SOP document provided on hire — every task has a step-by-step guide with screenshots

All content is reviewed and approved by the founder before publishing (initially — approval loop relaxes over time as trust builds)

Hours and pay:

10 hours per week, fixed monthly retainer (not hourly billing). We will agree a monthly rate based on your experience. Budget is $175–$250/month. 13th-month bonus in December.

Payment via Wise, weekly for the first month, then biweekly.

To apply:

Please include: (1) a brief description of the last WordPress site you managed and your role, (2) a screenshot or link showing your WordPress formatting work, (3) your Canva experience, and (4) your availability in Philippine time that overlaps with 8am–12pm Central European Time.

Applications that do not include these four items will not be reviewed.

title: Talent Liaison Specialist
description:
ABOUT THIS ROLE

You will be the dedicated support person for O-1 visa talent candidates registered on O1DMatch. International professionals — researchers, engineers, athletes, artists, entrepreneurs — sign up on our platform and need a real human to guide them through the process. Your job is to onboard new candidates, help them complete their profiles, walk them through uploading their evidence documents, explain their AI-generated O-1 score, and coach them step by step from sign-up through receiving and signing an employer interest letter. You are their guide, their advocate, and their main point of contact inside the company. This role requires empathy, patience, excellent communication, and strong organizational skills.



WHAT YOU WILL DO DAY-TO-DAY

•Welcome new talent candidates who sign up on O1DMatch and guide them through the onboarding process

•Help candidates understand how to complete their profile and what information to include

•Walk candidates through uploading evidence documents — awards, publications, memberships, press coverage — to the correct O-1 criteria categories

•Explain their AI-generated O-1 eligibility score and what it means for their visa case

•Keep candidates updated on the status of employer outreach being done on their behalf

•Help candidates review, accept, and sign interest letters received from employers

•Guide candidates on next steps after receiving a letter, including connecting with immigration attorneys through the platform

•Handle candidate questions via
, chat, and video call

•Maintain detailed notes on each candidate's progress in the CRM system



SKILLS & EXPERIENCE WE ARE LOOKING FOR

•Excellent written and spoken English with a warm, professional tone

•Strong empathy and patience — your clients are navigating a stressful, high-stakes immigration process

•Ability to explain complex processes like visa criteria and document requirements in plain, simple language

•Highly organized — you will manage many active candidates at different stages at the same time

•Experience in customer success, client support, account management, or similar roles

•Comfortable with video calls for onboarding and regular check-in sessions

•Familiarity with CRM or project tracking tools



NICE TO HAVE

•Experience working with international clients or professionals from different cultural backgrounds

•Background in immigration support, legal assistance, or HR

•Basic knowledge of US visa categories, especially O-1, EB-1, or H-1B



IMPORTANT NOTE

This role involves regular video and voice calls with international clients. Strong spoken English is essential.



HOW TO APPLY

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph, and send an
 to 
 include the following in your application message: (1) a brief description of any outreach, sales, research, or client-facing work you have done previously, (2) your English proficiency level and any relevant examples, and (3) your availability to work during US Eastern or Central time hours. Applications that do not include these details may not be reviewed.

title: Part-Time Paid Media Freelancer – Mother Made

What we’re looking for

title: Personal Brand Content Coordinator
description:
We are a husband-and-wife team building two personal brands: one in ecommerce entrepreneurship and one in real estate. 



We're looking for a sharp, organized, and creative Social Media Content Coordinator to help us plan, produce, and manage content across both brands. You will be the engine behind our content calendar, idea generation, and swiping of high performing content formats. You will have access to tools & you must be familiar with using AI.



Content Planning & Ideation (30% of time)



• Research trending topics, hooks, and content angles in both the ecommerce and real estate niches

• Use our existing content frameworks (100 Viral Hooks, 100 Content Ideas, 50 Content Prompts) to generate weekly content ideas for both brands

• Maintain and update two separate content calendars (using our Google Sheets template)

• Propose 15-20 content ideas per brand per month, organized by content pillar



Scripting & Pre-Production (25% of time)



• Draft short-form video scripts following our Hook - Problem - Promise - Credibility - Delivery - CTA framework

• Prepare shot lists and filming checklists for each batch filming session

• Identify which hooks, angles, and locations each video requires

• Organize and prep all materials so filming sessions take no more than 1-2 hours per month per brand



Post-Production Coordination (20% of time)



• Manage the editing workflow (either edit directly using CapCut/InShot or coordinate with a dedicated editor)

• Write captions that deliver standalone step-by-step value - not just teasers

• Add overlays, text hooks, and credibility proof where required

• Ensure all videos meet our production standards: vertical 9:16, multiple angles, proper lighting review



Publishing & Community Management (15% of time)



• Schedule and publish content across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and
 Reels

• Respond to comments and DMs using brand voice guidelines

• Manage comment-gated CTAs (e.g., when someone comments "grow," send them the appropriate link or invite)

• Monitor and flag engagement opportunities (collabs, viral trends, relevant conversations)



Analytics & Reporting (10% of time)



• Track weekly performance metrics: views, engagement rate, follower growth, saves, shares

• Deliver a simple weekly report highlighting top-performing content and insights

• Recommend adjustments to content strategy based on data



Requirements



• 2+ years of experience managing social media accounts (personal brands)

• Strong English writing skills - conversational, direct, first-person tone.

• Experience with short-form vertical video (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

• Proficiency with AI Tools (Manus, Claude), and Canva, CapCut or similar editing tools

• Highly organized with strong project management skills

• Familiarity with Google Sheets, Notion, or Trello for content calendar management

• Able to work independently across two brands without constant supervision



Bonus (Nice to Have)

• Experience in real estate or ecommerce content specifically

• Basic understanding of direct response copywriting principles (hooks, CTAs, fascinations)

• Video editing capability beyond basic cuts (transitions, text overlays, B-roll integration)

title: Work Order Assistant (Remote, Part-Time)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented assistant to help manage commercial service work orders.

This role focuses on keeping jobs moving. You will check existing vendors first, source when needed, contact vendors directly, coordinate scheduling, and follow up to ensure nothing sits idle.



The work itself is straightforward, but requires strong attention to detail, consistency, and the ability to follow instructions exactly.



Responsibilities:

-Check existing vendor list before sourcing new vendors

-Source local vendors when needed based on job type and location

-Contact vendors by phone and text using provided scripts

-Confirm availability and basic job fit

-Coordinate scheduling within required timelines

-Follow up consistently until jobs are moving forward

-Keep all work orders organized and up to date

-Escalate anything unclear instead of guessing



How you should work:

-You follow instructions exactly without skipping steps

-You are consistent and don’t let tasks sit unfinished

-You are comfortable doing repeat tasks the same way every time

-You pay attention to details and don’t miss small things

-You are comfortable making phone calls daily

-You prioritize the closest and most relevant vendors

-You prefer clear systems over guessing



This role is NOT a good fit if:

-You like to figure things out your own way

-You skip steps or improvise

-You overlook small details

-You avoid making phone calls

-You prefer flexible or creative work



Tools and workflow:

This role uses structured systems and tools including ChatGPT to assist with vendor sourcing, communication, and scheduling.



You should be comfortable using tools to support your work while still following instructions exactly and keeping outputs clean and structured.



Hours and pay:

Part-time, 2 to 4 hours per day & 10 to 20 hours per week starting.

Remote

4 to 6 dollars per hour



Application instructions:

Start your application with READY

Keep your response short and structured

Do not include unnecessary explanations



Test task:

Location Portland OR

Scope Interior electrical issue, lights not working in a commercial space

Find 2 to 3 electricians as close to the job site as possible. They must have recent reviews and clearly specialize in electrical work.



Provide the following for each:

Name

Company

Phone

Distance

Why they are a good fit



Final question:

In one sentence, explain how you would use ChatGPT to help with this role.

title: Senior SEO Specialist (Part-Time with Full-Time Potential)
description:
The Mission

We are a dynamic, creator-led business rapidly expanding our digital footprint. We are currently developing highly anticipated product concepts in stealth mode and need an exceptional SEO strategist to lay down the foundation for massive organic growth. We are building a robust brand ecosystem focused on deep audience engagement, and we need your expertise to ensure our new ventures dominate the search landscape from day one.



The Role

We are looking for a search visionary who can take complete ownership of our organic visibility. This role begins as a part-time position, offering you the flexibility to make a significant impact right away, with a strong, clear pathway to transition into a full-time role as our stealth products launch and the business scales.



What You Will Do



Architect and execute a comprehensive SEO strategy from the ground up to support our upcoming brand and product launches.



Conduct in-depth keyword research and competitor analysis to capture high-value traffic and drive genuine audience engagement.



Optimise all technical, on-page, and off-page elements across our digital properties.



Monitor traffic behaviour, analyse performance metrics, and pivot strategies to ensure maximum visibility.



Collaborate closely with our team to ensure all brand messaging is perfectly optimised for search without ever losing its authentic voice.



What You Bring to the Table



5 to 8 years of proven SEO experience: You have been in the trenches, you know what actually works, and you can confidently navigate the ever-changing search landscape.



Exceptional English communication skills: Flawless written and verbal communication is an absolute must. You need to be able to articulate complex SEO concepts into clear, actionable insights for the broader team.



Strategic business mindset: You understand that SEO is not just about rankings; it is a critical tool for long-term brand building and audience retention.



Self-starter energy: You thrive in a fast-paced, stealth-mode environment where you can build processes from scratch and take true ownership of your domain.



Why Join Us?

This is a rare opportunity to get in on the ground floor of a major brand evolution. You will have the creative freedom to shape our organic strategy from a blank slate and watch your work directly fuel the success of our new business ventures.



If you have the senior-level experience to dominate search rankings and the communication skills to lead the charge, we want to hear from you. Please send over your CV and a brief note on the most impressive SEO growth you have driven in your career.

—

REQUIREMENTS — DO NOT APPLY WITHOUT THESE

Minimum 2 years managing Google Ads accounts with documented results (ROAS, conversions, CPA improvements)

Hands-on SEO experience — not just theoretical knowledge

—

title: Employer Outreach Specialist
description:
About the Company

O1DMatch (
) is a US-based AI immigration marketplace — think Indeed, but built around visas. We connect extraordinary international talent with US employers who can support their O-1 visa petition. The O-1 visa is a US work visa for people with extraordinary ability in fields like science, business, technology, arts, athletics, and education. Our platform uses AI tools to score talent profiles, generate USCIS-ready interest letters, and match candidates with employers across 40+ industries. We are a growing startup based in Charlotte, NC with a live platform, active users, and investor backing. These positions are fully remote and open to candidates in the Philippines.



ABOUT THIS ROLE

You will contact US employers on behalf of specific O-1 visa talent candidates registered on our platform. When an extraordinary person — an engineer, researcher, artist, or athlete — needs a US employer to write them an interest letter for their visa petition, you are the one who finds that employer and makes it happen. You will reach out to companies by
, LinkedIn, and phone, explain what O1DMatch is, introduce the specific candidate, and walk the employer through signing up and sending an interest letter. This is an outreach and relationship role. You need to be confident communicating with US businesses, comfortable with rejection, and consistent with follow-up.



WHAT YOU WILL DO DAY-TO-DAY

•Review talent profiles on the O1DMatch platform and identify employers who would be a strong match for each candidate

•Reach out to US employers via
, LinkedIn, and phone on behalf of specific talent candidates

•Explain the O-1 visa process and what an employer interest letter is — and why it costs the employer nothing and creates no legal burden

•Guide interested employers to sign up on O1DMatch and send an interest letter to the candidate

•Follow up consistently with employers who have not yet responded

•Log all outreach activity and employer responses in our CRM database

•Coordinate with the Talent Liaison to keep candidates updated on outreach progress

•Report weekly on outreach numbers, response rates, and interest letters secured



SKILLS & EXPERIENCE WE ARE LOOKING FOR

•Excellent written and spoken English — you will be
ing and speaking directly with US businesses

•Experience with cold
 outreach, LinkedIn outreach, or B2B sales and recruitment tasks

•Comfortable making phone calls to US businesses during US business hours

•Ability to explain a complex process like O-1 visas and interest letters in simple, clear language

•Organized and able to track many employer conversations at the same time

•Familiarity with CRM tools or spreadsheet-based pipeline tracking

•Self-motivated and disciplined — you manage your own outreach pipeline without being reminded



NICE TO HAVE

•Prior experience in recruitment, business development, or immigration-adjacent work

•Familiarity with LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo.io, or similar prospecting tools

•Basic knowledge of US visa types, especially O-1, H-1B, or employment-based immigration



IMPORTANT NOTE

This role requires availability during US Eastern or Central time hours for employer calls and follow-up.



HOW TO APPLY

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph. Please include the following in your application message: (1) a brief description of any outreach, sales, research, or client-facing work you have done previously, (2) your English proficiency level and any relevant examples, and (3) your availability to work during US Eastern or Central time hours. Applications that do not include these details may not be reviewed.

title: Talent Liaison Specialist
description:
About the Company

O1DMatch (
) is a US-based AI immigration marketplace — think Indeed, but built around visas. We connect extraordinary international talent with US employers who can support their O-1 visa petition. The O-1 visa is a US work visa for people with extraordinary ability in fields like science, business, technology, arts, athletics, and education. Our platform uses AI tools to score talent profiles, generate USCIS-ready interest letters, and match candidates with employers across 40+ industries. We are a growing startup based in Charlotte, NC with a live platform, active users, and investor backing. These positions are fully remote and open to candidates in the Philippines.



ABOUT THIS ROLE

You will be the dedicated support person for O-1 visa talent candidates registered on O1DMatch. International professionals — researchers, engineers, athletes, artists, entrepreneurs — sign up on our platform and need a real human to guide them through the process. Your job is to onboard new candidates, help them complete their profiles, walk them through uploading their evidence documents, explain their AI-generated O-1 score, and coach them step by step from sign-up through receiving and signing an employer interest letter. You are their guide, their advocate, and their main point of contact inside the company. This role requires empathy, patience, excellent communication, and strong organizational skills.



WHAT YOU WILL DO DAY-TO-DAY

•Welcome new talent candidates who sign up on O1DMatch and guide them through the onboarding process

•Help candidates understand how to complete their profile and what information to include

•Walk candidates through uploading evidence documents — awards, publications, memberships, press coverage — to the correct O-1 criteria categories

•Explain their AI-generated O-1 eligibility score and what it means for their visa case

•Keep candidates updated on the status of employer outreach being done on their behalf

•Help candidates review, accept, and sign interest letters received from employers

•Guide candidates on next steps after receiving a letter, including connecting with immigration attorneys through the platform

•Handle candidate questions via
, chat, and video call

•Maintain detailed notes on each candidate's progress in the CRM system



SKILLS & EXPERIENCE WE ARE LOOKING FOR

•Excellent written and spoken English with a warm, professional tone

•Strong empathy and patience — your clients are navigating a stressful, high-stakes immigration process

•Ability to explain complex processes like visa criteria and document requirements in plain, simple language

•Highly organized — you will manage many active candidates at different stages at the same time

•Experience in customer success, client support, account management, or similar roles

•Comfortable with video calls for onboarding and regular check-in sessions

•Familiarity with CRM or project tracking tools



NICE TO HAVE

•Experience working with international clients or professionals from different cultural backgrounds

•Background in immigration support, legal assistance, or HR

•Basic knowledge of US visa categories, especially O-1, EB-1, or H-1B



IMPORTANT NOTE

This role involves regular video and voice calls with international clients. Strong spoken English is essential.



HOW TO APPLY

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph. Please include the following in your application message: (1) a brief description of any outreach, sales, research, or client-facing work you have done previously, (2) your English proficiency level and any relevant examples, and (3) your availability to work during US Eastern or Central time hours. Applications that do not include these details may not be reviewed.

title: Executive Operations Leader / Project Manager
description:
Executive Operations Leader / Project Manager

Short-Term Rental Portfolio (Guesty / Airbnb / VRBO)



Location: Remote

Company Base: San Diego, California



About the Company



We are a fast-growing, systems-driven short-term rental company managing 30+ premium properties across Southern California, with plans to scale significantly.



Our portfolio includes high-end properties with complex amenities such as:



• Pools

• Hot tubs and jacuzzis

• Saunas

• Smart home systems

• Multi-level homes requiring coordinated operations



Running these properties requires excellent coordination between guest communication teams, cleaners, maintenance crews, pricing management, and operations staff.



We already have a team of capable virtual assistants handling many day-to-day tasks, but we are now seeking a high-level operations leader who can step in, organize the system, strengthen processes, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks.



This is not a typical virtual assistant role.



We are looking for someone who can take the ball by the horns and truly run the operation.



Our goal is to build a well-oiled machine where systems, processes, and team accountability allow the company to scale efficiently without constant owner involvement.



The Role



We are seeking an Executive Operations Leader / Project Manager with deep experience in short-term rental operations and Guesty PMS.



This person will help oversee the operation, improve systems, organize the team, and ensure daily operations run smoothly.



You should be someone who can quickly understand a complex operation and bring structure, efficiency, and accountability to the business.



This role may begin as a consulting or part-time leadership position (5–15 hours per week) and may expand into a larger operational leadership role depending on fit.



Our Current Tech Stack



We rely heavily on technology and systems to run the business efficiently.



Our current tools include:



• Guesty – property management system

• Slack – communication with our virtual assistant team

• WhatsApp – communication with cleaners and field teams when needed

• 
 – operational task tracking including maintenance, lost and found, and other issues

• Google Workspace – Sheets, Docs, Drive

• Excel



We are currently evaluating additional tools including:



• Guesty Price Optimizer

• PriceLabs

• Breezeway

• Perto



The person in this role may help evaluate, implement, and optimize these systems.



Key Responsibilities



Operational Leadership



• Oversee daily operations across the short-term rental portfolio

• Identify inefficiencies and implement improvements

• Ensure operational tasks are tracked and completed

• Create structure, accountability, and clear workflows



Team Management



• Lead and organize a team of virtual assistants

• Delegate tasks effectively

• Ensure nothing falls into the operational “black hole”

• Improve communication between guest support, cleaners, and maintenance teams



Systems & Process Improvement



• Improve internal systems and standard operating procedures

• Optimize Guesty automations and workflows

• Improve task management and reporting in 

• Implement scalable operational processes as the business grows



Pricing & Revenue Support



• Help implement and optimize dynamic pricing tools such as PriceLabs or Guesty Price Optimizer

• Monitor calendar accuracy and pricing coordination

• Support availability management across Airbnb, VRBO, and direct bookings



Guest & Vendor Communication



• Serve as a senior escalation point for complex guest issues

• Communicate confidently with guests, vendors, and tea
mbers when necessary

• Ensure high standards of guest experience across the portfolio



Reporting & Accountability



• Create operational dashboards and reporting for ownership

• Track key operational metrics

• Identify opportunities to increase efficiency and profitability



Technology & AI



• Use tools such as ChatGPT and other AI platforms to improve workflows, documentation, and operational efficiency



Required Experience



We are looking for someone who has helped run or scale a serious operation before.



You should have:



• Extensive experience with Guesty PMS

• Strong experience in short-term rental operations

• Experience managing properties listed on Airbnb and VRBO

• Experience managing remote teams and virtual assistants

• Strong operational leadership and project management ability

• Experience implementing systems, SOPs, and operational workflows

• Strong written and spoken English

• Ability to confidently communicate with guests, vendors, and tea
mbers

• Strong organization and problem-solving skills



Highly Preferred Experience



• Experience with dynamic pricing tools (PriceLabs, Wheelhouse, Guesty Price Optimizer)

• Experience managing large STR portfolios

• Experience managing properties with pools, hot tubs, and complex maintenance coordination

• Experience with Slack and 

• Experience implementing operations software such as Breezeway or similar tools



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who is:



• Highly organized

• Systems-driven

• Proactive and reliable

• A strong communicator

• Comfortable leading a team

• Able to take ownership of complex operations



Most importantly, we want someone who can step in, take responsibility, and help build a world-class short-term rental operation.



Time Commitment



Flexible.



Expected initial commitment:



5–15 hours per week



This role may expand into a larger operational leadership position depending on fit.



Compensation



Competitive and based on experience.



Opportunities for long-term growth, increased responsibility, and performance-based raises.

title: Wholesale Coordinator
description:
Location: Remote 

Reports To: Wholesale Directors

Department: Wholesale



About Chamelo

Chamelo is a celebrity-backed brand growing triple digits. We bootstrapped our way to 8-figures and are about to close a VC round with the goal to accelerate growth toward an IPO.

At Chamelo, we’re engineering a new era of smart eyewear by combining state-of-the-art technology with cutting-edge style. Our mission goes beyond creating dynamic and stylish glasses—we’re pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in a traditionally static industry.

Our eyewear isn’t just functional—it’s bold, customizable, and effortlessly cool. Backed by iconic figures like Shaquille O’Neal and Bad Bunny, Chamelo is on pace for rapid expansion, offering an exciting opportunity to be part of our growth story.



About the Role

We are hiring two highly organized and detail-driven Wholesale Coordinators to support the rapid expansion of Chamelo’s global B2B and retail partnerships.

This role is critical in managing the end-to-end wholesale order lifecycle — from account onboarding and order processing to fulfillment coordination, inventory allocation, and post-delivery support. You will serve as the operational backbone of the wholesale team, ensuring a seamless experience for retail partners while maintaining internal accuracy and efficiency.

The ideal candidates are proactive, data-driven, and thrive in a fast-paced environment where precision, communication, and follow-through are essential.



Key Responsibilities

Wholesale Order Management

Process and manage wholesale purchase orders from receipt to fulfillment.

Validate pricing, SKUs, quantities, payment terms, and shipping requirements.

Coordinate order entry, acknowledgments, and invoice accuracy.

Track order status and provide timely updates to wholesale partners and internal teams.

Account & Partner Support

Assist with onboarding new wholesale accounts, including documentation and system setup.

Serve as a primary point of contact for order-related inquiries and operational requests.

Maintain strong, professional communication with retail buyers and distributors.

Support key accounts to ensure smooth reorders and ongoing partnership growth.

Inventory Allocation & Fulfillment Coordination

Work closely with supply chain and warehouse/3PL partners to allocate inventory for wholesale orders.

Monitor stock availability and communicate potential shortages or delays proactively.

Coordinate shipment scheduling and routing based on partner requirements and delivery windows.

Ensure compliance with retailer routing guides and packaging standards.

Data Management & Reporting

Maintain accurate wholesale data across ERP/CRM/order management systems.

Track wholesale KPIs such as order accuracy, fulfillment timelines, sell-through support, and backorder rates.

Assist in preparing weekly and monthly wholesale performance reports.

Help maintain up-to-date account records, price lists, and line sheets.

Cross-Team Collaboration

Partner with Sales, Finance, Supply Chain, and Customer Experience to ensure seamless execution.

Support product launches, seasonal buys, and promotional campaigns from an operational perspective.

Assist with trade shows, market appointments, and sample coordination as needed.

Contribute to building and improving scalable wholesale SOPs and workflows.



Qualifications

Strong organizational and time management skills with exceptional attention to detail.

Experience in wholesale, B2B sales support, order management, or supply chain coordination, preferably in ecommerce or consumer goods.

Proficiency with ERP/CRM systems, inventory tools, and Google Workspace/Microsoft Office.

Ability to manage multiple accounts and orders simultaneously in a deadline-driven environment.

Clear and professional written and verbal communication.

Solution-oriented mindset with a proactive approach to problem-solving.

Experience working with global retail partners, distributors, or 3PLs is a strong advantage.



What We Offer

Competitive above-market salary.

Paid time off and paid holidays.

13th month pay.

Regular performance bonus.

Annual salary bonus/increases based on performance.

Remote-friendly work environment.

Fun and collaborative culture with team contests.



Application Process

Please send your resume and answers to the following questions to 

Subject Line: “Wholesale Operator!”

Application Questions

If you could be one famous entrepreneur (alive or dead), who would you be and why?

One paragraph (5 sentences max) on any relevant experience you have.

Your favorite productivity hack.

What are your key strengths?

What are your weaknesses?

Your desired number of weekly hours & desired start date.

Your availability next week for a quick chat.

Equal Opportunity

Chamelo is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

title: Nonprofit Senior Bookkeeper
description:
About the Firm

We are a USA-based accounting and advisory firm dedicated exclusively to serving nonprofit organizations and mental health practices. We manage the complete accounting cycle for a portfolio of nonprofit clients simultaneously, delivering accurate, timely, and audit-ready financial records. Our clients trust us with the financial foundation of their missions. Every team member we bring on is expected to perform at a professional level from day one, follow our documented systems, and take genuine ownership of their client portfolio. 



About the Role

We are seeking an experienced Senior Bookkeeper to own the full accounting cycle for a portfolio of nonprofit clients. This role begins part-time and expands to full-time as performance benchmarks are met. You will work within our established systems and be accountable to firm-wide accuracy and deadline standards from day one. This is not an entry-level role. You are expected to arrive with a fully developed competency in nonprofit accounting and the professional judgment to apply it independently across multiple clients in a remote environment.



Full Accounting Cycle Management

 - Record and classify all transactions on an accrual basis in the accounting system with proper account coding, class tracking, and fund designation.

 - Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable: enter vendor bills, process payments, record invoices, and apply receipts accurately.

 - Prepare and post all month-end journal entries, including accruals, prepaid amortization, depreciation, and deferred revenue schedules.

 - Complete bank, credit card, and balance sheet account reconciliations to zero variance every month without exception.

 - Review the trial balance for anomalies, transposition errors, and misclassifications before financials are issued to clients.

 - Produce and deliver month-end financial statements: Statement of Financial Position, Statement of Activities, and Budget vs. Actual reports.



Nonprofit-Specific Accounting

 - Apply FASB ASC 958 and ASU 2016-14 standards, including proper net asset classification (with donor restrictions and without donor restrictions).

 - Track restricted and unrestricted funds separately and release restrictions when grant conditions are met with proper journal entry documentation.

 - Allocate expenses across program services, management and general, and fundraising functions using class tracking in QBO.

 - Prepare grant expenditure reports and supporting schedules for client grant reporting requirements.

 - Support Form 990 preparation by maintaining clean, organized records and preparing schedules as requested.

 - Coordinate with external auditors by providing supporting documentation, reconciling the PBC (Prepared by Client) list items, and responding to audit requests.

 - Record semi-monthly payroll journal entries with accurate allocation across cost centers, grants, and functional expense categories.

 - Reconcile payroll liability accounts monthly and confirm tax deposits are accurately reflected in the books.



Quality Control and Communication

 - Identify errors, inconsistencies, and missing information proactively before they reach the client.

 - Proactively communicate issues to the firm owner, team leads, and clients, including a proposed resolution in every notification.

 - Meet all client deliverable deadlines, maintaining a 98?curacy benchmark across all client work. 

 - Manage workload without micromanagement and follow the firm’s documented processes.



Required Qualifications

 - Minimum 5 years of accrual-basis nonprofit accounting experience with demonstrated ability to apply accrual accounting, including fund accounting, net asset classifications under ASU 2016-14, grant tracking, and functional expense allocation independently and without supervision.

 - Experience managing multiple clients simultaneously in an outsourced accounting firm or agency setting. Sequential full-time employer roles are not equivalent.

 - Minimum 12 consecutive months of fully remote, self-directed work with independent deadline management.

 - Advanced proficiency in QuickBooks Online, Xero, Asana, Google Workspace, and Microsoft Office.

 - Professional written and verbal communication in English, including the ability to explain accounting issues clearly to non-accounting clients.

 - Revenue Recognition: Demonstrated ability to apply ASC 606 and ASC 842 standards, specifically managing revenue recognition based on grant documents, funder restrictions, and milestones.

 - Technical Mastery: Deep understanding of U.S.A GAAP and grant compliance standards.

 - Startup Mindset: Ability to context-shift between a variety of clients and thrive in an agile, fast-paced environment. 

 - Experience supporting Form 990 preparation and annual audit coordination.

 - Familiarity with federal, state, or foundation grant compliance reporting requirements.

title: HR AND OPERATIONS SUPPORT
description:
I'm looking for a sharp, people-first HR & Recruitment Coordinator who is technically savvy, highly organized, and ready to own this role from day one. This is not a placeholder position — we're building something real and we need someone who wants to be part of it.



---



WHAT THIS ROLE OWNS

- Team compliance tracking — making sure every placed tea
mber meets standards and stays accountable

- Onboarding experience — building and running a structured onboarding process that sets every new hire up to win from day one

mbers out cleanly and sourcing qualified substitutes quickly when needed

- HR documentation — maintaining team records, contracts, and internal HR policies in Notion

- Culture support — actively contributing to a high-performance internal environment where people feel seen and held to a standard

YOU'RE THE RIGHT PERSON IF YOU:

title: Long-Term HubSpot Solutions Architect — Agency Partnership

We're looking for a Solutions Architect to be the technical backbone of our delivery — someone who can take a client brief and design the entire HubSpot solution before a developer touches a single thing.

This is not a VA role. This is not a junior position. You'll be designing the architecture, not executing it.

What You'll Be Doing:



Taking client briefs and translating them into detailed HubSpot solution designs (pipelines, workflows, data models, integration maps)

Defining the technical approach before the build begins — what gets built, how it connects, and in what order

Working directly with me to scope and price projects accurately

QA-ing completed builds to make sure they match the original design

Keeping documentation clean and client-ready at every stage



How We'll Work Together

I'll give you:



Client briefs and discovery call recordings

A dev team who handles the actual build

Clear SOPs and delivery frameworks

Long-term work if you perform well



You'll:



Own the architecture decisions

Flag scope issues before they become problems

Keep documentation clean and up to date

Maintain high standards consistently



Required Experience:



3+ years of hands-on HubSpot experience across Sales Hub, Marketing Hub, CMS, and Operations Hub

You've designed HubSpot solutions from scratch — not just configured what someone else mapped out

Strong understanding of CRM data models: contact properties, pipeline stages, lifecycle stages, association logic

Experience with automation and integration tools — 
, Zapier, or API-based

Strong written English — you'll be reviewing client-facing documents and solution plans



If you've never designed a HubSpot solution end-to-end, this role is not for you.

Nice to Have:



HubSpot certifications

Background in a HubSpot Solutions Partner or digital agency

Familiarity with RevOps or B2B SaaS clients

Experience with HubL or custom CMS modules



Engagement Details:

Full-time | Ongoing | $8/hr

100% remote — must have overlap with AEST (Sydney time)

To Apply:

One specific HubSpot solution you designed — what was the brief, what did you design, and what was the outcome

Examples of solution documentation you've created (flow diagrams, specs, architecture maps)



Applications without HubSpot-specific examples will not be considered.

s

Preferred Experience:



-Appointment setting

-Lead qualification

-Call center support

-Live transfer / warm transfer experience

-Phone sales / outreach

title: Remote Office Team | Highly proficient in Excel
description:
Established in 1984, PTFS, LLC is a commercial services company headquartered in Houston TX. Some of our clients have been longstanding customers of ours for over 40 years. We are extremely data driven and we use Excel heavily for most of our company tasks.



We are in process of building a fully remote team in the PH which will eventually take over all US based operations. We are looking for tea
mbers LONG TERM. We value loyalty and tenure-ship and most importantly, availability. We would like all of the tea
mbers we bring onboard to retire with us. We are firm believers that everybody working here deserves the opportunity to grow. Everyone will have a clear understanding of the trajectory of their career path. After 1 year, every tea
mber will go through the process of performance review determining promotion / increase in compensation. The metrics we use are:



- Improved understanding of company processes 

- Thoroughness & speed in taking proper actions 

- Frequency of errors / how individual has corrected them

- New responsibilities assumed since hire

- Dependency & Availability

- Does the individual go above & beyond? 

- Is the individual eager to take the lead in any situation?

- Does the individual possess other skills helpful to the company? 



Our line of work is very fast paced with ever-changing requests from clients. Schedules are set but can change at any given 
nt. It is important for tea
mbers to understand what needs to be done when a sudden change is requested by a customer as there are field workers who are dependent on the office to communicate such changes.  As a tea
mber, we need you to be versatile, stepping up or filling in at any given 
nt if another tea
mber is busy or unavailable. Thus, we don't have a separation of duties. Each tea
mber must be able to do EVERYTHING



If you are interested in applying for this position, please answer the following questions and include your response to your message.



On a scale of 1-10 with 10 being complete mastery and 1 being complete novice, what would you say your proficiency level is with the following:

Index & Match

Conditional Formatting

Pivot Tables

Power Query

Data Validation

Macros

Dashboards

Advanced Charting



Please list all other programs, apps, software, technical skills that you have knowledge with followed by - Scale 1-10 proficiency level for each

Written English

title: Video Editor- YouTube Long Form and Instagram Reels
description:
Hi everyone,

I am looking for a Video Editor who lives and breathes YouTube long form and Instagram Reels.

Not commercials/documentary/wedding etc etc

 YouTube & IG — specifically talking head content that feels dynamic, well-paced, and holds attention without relying on gimmicks.



---



WHAT YOU'LL BE EDITING



- Long form talking head videos (15 mins to 60+ mins, occasionally longer)

- Short form vertical content for Instagram Reels 

- Occasional video carousels



Footage will be clean, well-lit, main camera talking head, with some occasional b-roll of top-down shots on a desk. Audio will come with the video footage.

Your job is pacing, cuts, supers/text animations, music, SFX, and making the whole thing feel alive without it feeling overproduced.



You won't be receiving raw unedited footage. Before anything reaches you, I'll have already removed bad takes, fluff, pauses and wrong lines in Riverside — so what you get is essentially a clean assembly cut aligned to the script. Your job starts from there: pacing, energy, supers, music, SFX, transitions.



---



WHAT I'M LOOKING FOR



- Proven YouTube editing experience — show me channels you've edited, not just a showreel

- Strong sense of pacing for talking head content — you know when to cut, when to hold, when a pause is doing the work

- Comfortable with text animations and supers — we'll have a template but you need to be able to work within it and occasionally adapt it

- Music and SFX selection — you have an ear for it

- Able to edit short form vertical with more dynamic cuts

- Premiere Pro preferred

- Fast turnaround and clear communication — I work to a publishing schedule and I need reliability above all else

- Comfortable receiving clean assembly cuts via Riverside or standard export formats — no raw footage wrangling required.



---



NICE TO HAVE



- Experience with Opus Clip or similar AI clipping tools

- Familiarity with educational or interview-style YouTube content

- Basic motion graphics capability beyond text templates



---



HOW TO APPLY



Send me:

1. Some links of long/short form videos you edited

2. Your rate: Preferably a flat fee, I'm working toward one long form + 14 shorts per fortnight per fortnight (Considering that half of the shorts will be clipped from the long form. So this will be ongoing for the right fit. But if you prefer to keep the rate per video, feel free to share the long form rate and the shorts too.

 marketing platforms and design tools (advanced level)

Semi-monthly pay

Direct deposit

Performance-based bonuses

Growth opportunities for high-performing team members



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

Ability to work on a computer for extended periods and PST timezone

ABOUT WINNIE & ETHEL’S

Modeled after the iconic, round-the-clock American eatery of the 1940s, Winnie & Ethel’s Downtown Diner draws upon the rich history and legacy of Las Vegas’ Huntridge Theater and neighborhood. Chef Aaron Lee and CEO Mallory Gott named the restaurant after his grandma Winnie and her great-grandma Ethel whose warm, loving kitchens were always open.

title: Senior Media Buyer
description:
We're a digital marketing agency looking for an experienced Media Buyer to take ownership of Google Ads and Meta Ads across our client accounts. This is a role for someone who combines strong strategic thinking with hands-on execution and is confident doing both well.



This is a part-time role (20 hours per week) working NZ business hours, with real potential to grow into a full-time position. If you enjoy being in the accounts every day and want to work somewhere your expertise is genuinely valued, we'd love to hear from you.



What you'll be doing

This role blends strategy with daily execution. You'll be:

- Conducting a thorough daily review of Google Ads and Meta Ads accounts across the portfolio

- Monitoring campaign health across key metrics (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CPM, CPC) and acting on what you find

- Developing and applying campaign strategies that align with each client's goals

- Making bid, budget, and targeting adjustments based on live performance data

- Planning and running structured A/B tests across creatives, audiences, and campaign structures

- Identifying strategic opportunities and making proactive recommendations to improve results

- Setting up and launching new campaigns from brief through to live

- Ensuring tracking, attribution, and reporting are accurate and up to date



What we need from you

We're looking for someone who can demonstrate:

- At least 5 years of hands-on, end-to-end experience managing Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns

- Strong strategic thinking, the ability to look at an account and know what needs to happen next

- A track record of real campaign results across a range of clients or industries

- The ability to diagnose performance issues quickly and independently

- Experience managing multiple accounts at once while maintaining a high standard across all of them

- Clear written communication skills in English and the confidence to keep the team well informed

- Availability to work NZ business hours reliably for the full 20 hours per week

- High attention to detail across every campaign they manage



Tools and Platforms

You should be confident and experienced with:

- Google Ads (Search, Display, Performance Max, Shopping)

- Meta Ads Manager 
 & Instagram)

- Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and Google Tag Manager

- Looker Studio for reporting and dashboards

- Project management tools such as Asana, ClickUp, or Monday.com



This role is a great fit if...

- You have solid experience across both Google Ads and Meta Ads and are confident working across multiple accounts

- You think strategically and enjoy finding ways to improve performance, not just maintain it

- You are self-directed and comfortable working remotely with minimal supervision

- Part-time suits where you are right now and you are open to the role growing over time

- You are available to work during NZ business hours





If you are experienced, autonomous, and ready to own a portfolio of accounts from day one, we would love to hear from you. This role starts part time but grows with the right person.

title: Senior Creative Designer / Art Director
description:
About Us



We're a small growing creative agency working with CPG brands. We handle their entire creative production: branding, print and digital campaigns, e-commerce visuals, social media assets, AI-powered content, and more.



We work as an embedded creative team, delivering high-quality work through a streamlined Kanban workflow with fast turnarounds.



We're currently 2 (myself and a graphic designer) and looking to grow the team. Preference for CET-compatible timezones.



The Role



We are looking for a Senior Creative Designer with strong art direction skills. You will focus on creative execution: designing, producing, and polishing high-quality assets across branding, print, digital, and AI-powered workflows.



We need someone with 5 to 10 years of experience in graphic design, art direction, or creative production. You take ownership of your work, check every detail, and deliver assets that are ready to go live without supervision.



You will receive briefs from the team lead or directly from clients if proven communication ability, and focus on producing excellent creative work. Communication happens internally via Discord and Linear.



What You Will Do



Brand Identity & Print Design: Create and refine logos, brand identities, and visual systems. Design retail advertising (posters, POS, flyers, business cards), product catalogs, lookbooks, and packaging layouts. You must be comfortable preparing print-ready files following printer requirements (bleeds, trim marks, color standards). Build 360 web campaigns for product launches and brand activations, with strong knowledge of common web ratios and standards.



Digital & Campaign Design: Design ad creatives, social media assets,
 templates, e-commerce product pages, and banner kits. Ensure all visuals are on-brand, properly sized, and conversion-focused.



AI Visual Production: Use AI-powered tools to generate product lifestyle scenes, virtual try-ons, UGC-style content, product video sequences, and high-volume creative variations. Write effective prompts and work with generative image and video models (Runway, Kling, Flux, Nano Banana, Vemo, Seedance, etc.). Experience with Freepik Space for AI campaign production (outfit generation, scene building, content creation) is a big plus. If you haven't used this specific tool, you must be the type of person who learns new tools on a regular basis. This is a fast-paced, constantly evolving industry.



Quality Control: This is one of the most important parts of the job. You proofread every single text. You verify every dimension. You check every alignment. You make sure the deliverable matches the brief exactly. You re-check your own work multiple times before anything goes out. If you are not naturally obsessive about details, this role is not for you.



Required Skills



- Expert-level Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, and InDesign. Figma is used for teamwork and presentations but no special experience is required.

- Hands-on experience with AI image/video generation. Strong prompting skills. Familiarity with generative models and AI creative workflows.

- Strong eye for composition, typography, color, and layout. Knowledge of photography principles. Natural affinity with fashion, lifestyle, and consumer brand aesthetics.

- Obsessive about accuracy. Typos, misaligned elements, and wrong dimensions are unacceptable to you.

- Professional English (written).



Nice to Have



Experience working with fashion, footwear, or CPG brands. Portfolio showing retail advertising, campaign visuals, or AI-generated brand content. Experience with UGC content creation or AI campaign production pipelines (e.g. Freepik Space). Motion design or short-form video editing skills. Knowledge of no-code website builders such as Framer or Webflow.



What We Provide



All software licenses: Adobe Creative Cloud, Figma, AI tools, and platform subscriptions. You work on your own computer. This is a long-term, stable position with a growing agency. You will work directly with the founder and creative director, who has 20+ years of experience in art direction for global brands.



SSS, PhilHealth, and Pag-IBIG contributions covered. 13th month pay included.



How to Apply



Send your portfolio link and a short message explaining why this role is a good fit for you. Include examples of AI-generated visuals or campaign work if you have them. We value quality of work over length of CV.

title: Account Manager- Inbound Sales & Client Services
description:
Proper Printshop · El Paso, TX (Remote) · Full-Time · $800–$1,000/mo + 1% commission · Philippines



Who we are:

Proper Printshop is a 15-year-old screen printing, DTF, embroidery, and fulfillment company based in El Paso, TX. We serve major universities, professional sports organizations, corporations, and businesses across the country- from 10,000 shirts for collegiate clients to 25 shirts for a birthday party. We move fast and take quality seriously, and we're looking for a front-office person who does the same.



The role:

You're the first voice and first response customers get from Proper Printshop. You'll own inbound quote requests, answer calls via Google Voice, build accurate quotes in Printavo, and follow up until orders are closed. When things are slow, you're not waiting around- you're making outbound calls to past customers and small businesses to generate new orders. You'll have full ownership of your accounts and earn commission on everything you bring in.



What you'll be doing:

Answering inbound calls via Google Voice during business hours (8-5 PM MST)- clear, confident, and friendly. Responding promptly to quote requests via
 and web form. Building accurate quotes in Printavo and following up to close. Entering and managing orders in Printavo- accuracy matters! Upselling add-ons like rush turnaround, premium garments, extra print locations, stickers, and promo items. Managing proofs, revisions, and keeping customers updated on timelines. Making outbound calls to past clients and small businesses to generate repeat and new orders. Tracking leads and follow-ups in HubSpot. Staying responsive on Google Chat and WhatsApp with the internal team throughout the day. Escalating large corporate or fulfillment program inquiries to the lead account manager.



What you need:

Fluent, natural spoken and written English- you're talking to US customers all day, this is non-negotiable. Clear, warm phone presence. Detail-oriented- bad quotes cost the shop money. Available and responsive 8 AM – 5 PM MST, Monday through Friday. Fast, reliable internet for live calls via Google Voice. Comfortable juggling multiple open orders and follow-ups at once. Self-starter- when there's no inbound, you're creating outbound.



Big plus:

Any Spanish. Background in print, apparel, or promo products. Experience with Printavo, HubSpot, or similar tools. Previous inside sales or account management experience.



Pay:

Base: $800–$1,000/month. Commission: 1% of all collected revenue. The more you sell and upsell, the more you make. Good closers earn well above base here.



Tools you'll use:

Google Voice, Gmail, Google Chat, WhatsApp, Printavo, HubSpot, Google Meet.



Before you apply:

If you're using AI to write your application, at least make it sound like you. We want to hear your voice- not ChatGPT's. Tell us about a time you turned a quote into a closed order, how you handled a difficult customer, or why you'd be great at this. Skip the template. Send us the real version of you.

title: Video Editor / Animator (Part-Time ? Full-Time Opportunity)
description:
Video Editor / Animator (Part-Time ? Full-Time Opportunity)



Type: Part-Time (20 hours per week)

Schedule: Day Shift

Salary: $7 USD per hour (1,212 USD per month) – paid every Friday

Potential: Opportunity to transition to Full-Time



About Us



We are an Australian AI technology company building innovative tools for legal professionals. Our platform helps lawyers work more efficiently using artificial intelligence.



As we continue to grow, we are expanding our video content production to support educational content, product demonstrations, and marketing campaigns. We’re looking for a creative and reliable Video Editor / Animator who can help bring our ideas to life.



Role Overview



As our Video Editor / Animator, you will transform raw footage and concepts into engaging, professional, and visually compelling videos.



You will work closely with our team to produce content for education, marketing, and product storytelling, helping communicate complex ideas in a clear and engaging way.



We have a structured workflow and feedback system in place. Editors will be expected to document feedback and improvements using a checklist system we provide, helping ensure continuous improvement and consistent production quality across projects.



Key Responsibilities



• Edit and enhance raw video footage into polished final videos



• Create engaging narratives through pacing, transitions, and storytelling



• Add graphics, animations, captions, and visual effects where appropriate



• Improve audio quality through noise reduction, music integration, and voiceovers



• Follow editing guidelines and production checklists provided by the team



• Record feedback and improvement notes into the project checklist system



• Organize video files and assets to maintain a clean production workflow



• Collaborate with the team to deliver content aligned with project goals



• Make revisions and improvements based on feedback



Required Skills



• Proven experience as a Video Editor



• Strong portfolio demonstrating editing and storytelling ability



Proficiency in tools such as:



• Adobe Premiere Pro



• After Effects



• Final Cut Pro



• or similar editing software



Strong understanding of:



• Video formats and resolutions



• Export settings and compression



• Audio editing and sound balancing



• Ability to meet deadlines and manage multiple tasks



• Strong attention to detail



Bonus Skills (Nice to Have)



• Motion graphics / animation experience



• Experience creating educational or SaaS product videos



• Familiarity with AI tools for video production



• Basic graphic design skills



What We’re Looking For



We value editors who are:



• Organized and reliable



• Creative but detail-oriented



• Open to structured workflows and feedback



• Interested in long-term collaboration



This position starts part-time, but strong performers may transition to a full-time role as our content production expands.



Application Requirements



To help us evaluate candidates properly, please include the following in your application:



• Your resume



• A short cover letter explaining your video editing experience



• A link to your portfolio showcasing your past work



• Your LinkedIn profile



• Two professional references we may contact



Please ensure your portfolio links can be viewed in an incognito window (without login access)



Additionally, please include the following details:



• Your internet speed (download and upload)



• Your computer specifications (CPU, RAM, GPU)



• Your backup internet options



• Your backup power solution in case of brownouts or outages



How to Apply



To confirm you’ve read this entire job post, please include the word:



"kangaroo"



at the end of your application.



Join our team and help create high-impact video content for the future of AI in the legal industry.

title: Procurement Officer
description:
Admin & Recruitment Support Specialist

Full-Time | Remote | Australian Recruitment Company



We are an Australian-based BPO seeking an experienced Procurement Officer to support our client, an Australian mining company.



This is a full-time (FT) role of 40 hours per week, during Australian business hours. Offering the flexibility of working-from-home (WFH) and a competitive salary package + paid leave + bonuses.



This role is responsible for delivering a comprehensive and value-driven approach to procurement and contract management, supporting operations and projects. We’re looking for someone highly organized, detail-oriented, and confident working across suppliers, logistics, and internal stakeholders.



Key Responsibilities Include



Procurement & Contract Management

• Prepare and issue tender documentation, RFQs, and purchase orders for high value/high risk items

• Conduct commercial and technical evaluation of supplier bids

• Ensure purchase orders comply with specifications and requirements

• Identify and recommend procurement strategies to reduce costs without compromising quality

• Ensure timely purchasing commitments aligned with operational needs

• Support contract management and procurement lifecycle activities



Supplier & Stakeholder Management

• Build and maintain strong relationships with suppliers and internal stakeholders

• Develop strong knowledge of supplier capabilities and market options

• Coordinate with suppliers for timely delivery of materials and spare parts

• Attend material status meetings and provide updates on outstanding orders

• Liaise with internal teams to align procurement priorities



Logistics & Expediting

• Expedite materials to ensure on-time delivery for operations and projects

• Monitor transport schedules and coordinate with logistics providers

• Track shipments and resolve delivery issues proactively



Reporting & Compliance

• Prepare accurate and professional procurement reports

• Maintain high attention to detail across documentation and processes

• Draft bilingual reports (English/Mandarin) where required

• Maintain procurement records and ensure compliance with company standards



Project Support

• Provide procurement support for operations and upcoming projects

• Assist in sourcing materials and coordinating deliveries



Systems & Tools You’ll Use

• Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)

• Procurement / Supply Chain Systems

• ERP Systems



***** Key Requirements Include ***** MUST HAVES to apply



• Proven end-to-end procurement experience

• Bachelor degree or above in engineering or relevant field 

• Experience handling tenders, RFQs, and purchase orders

• Strong ability to analyze costs and recommend cost-saving strategies

• Experience coordinating with suppliers, logistics, and stakeholders

• Experience in mining, construction, or heavy industry procurement

• Experience supporting operations and project-based procurement

• Familiarity with logistics coordination and expediting

• Bilingual in English and Mandarin (written and spoken)

• Bachelor’s degree in Engineering or relevant field



IDEAL CANDIDATES have

• Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

• Excellent written and spoken English

• Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines

• Strong problem-solving and coordination skills

• Proficiency in Microsoft Office and procurement/supply chain systems



Important – How To Apply



To be considered, please follow these instructions:



Link your CV for us to review.

*****Important – How To Apply*****



To be considered, please follow these instructions:

1. Link your CV for us to review.

2. Provide an overview of your WFH set-up. ( You must have your own work device, fast and reliable internet, back-up internet and power options, co-working space/internet cafe within 20 minutes travel time).

3. Provide a short outline of your experience in recruitment/ admin support/ compliance.

4. List the systems/tools you’ve used

5. Provide a short video/voice introduction to yourself.



Applications that do not follow instructions may not be reviewed.



Thank you
