Budget tracking or reporting experience

title: Product Designer – Longshot Labs
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a Product Designer to be the first dedicated design hire at Longshot, a prediction market focused on deep liquidity and user experience. You will work directly with the founders to build the product experience from the ground up, owning everything from initial ideation to production-ready specs.

What You'll Do

Own the core product experience 

You'll be the design voice for Longshot's most critical surfaces, including the trading and markets pages where users place predictions, and the onboarding flows that turn new visitors into active traders. You'll think in real interactions: order states, loading behaviors, edge cases, empty states, and the small 
nts that make a product feel trustworthy rather than thrown together.

Build and evolve the design system 

You will take ownership of a design system that has some initial components, but is still in development. You will walk through what already exists, establish component standards, define tokens, and build a library that scales as the product grows. Your system will be the foundation that lets the rest of the team ship faster without losing consistency.

Drive ideation to handoff 

You will be in the room from the earliest conversations through to engineering handoff. That means contributing to requirements discussions, iterating quickly on concepts, producing clean Figma files with clear components and annotations, and providing clarifications as engineers perform wiring.

Think like an owner 

You'll have bi-weekly design reviews directly with the founders and a seat at the table on product decisions. We want someone who voices their opinions when something doesn't serve the user and measures success by the look of the final product.

Drive decisions related to graphic, branding, and marketing assets

Longshot's visual identity doesn't stop at the app. You'll own how we look everywhere else too: the marketing site, brand assets, graphics, all of it. Same care, same eye, same standards as the product. When something looks off, you'll catch it. And you'll fix it.

What We're Looking For

You have 1 to 4 years of experience as a product or UX designer, ideally at a startup. You're deeply comfortable in Figma. You use AI tools to naturally complement your workflow, but major decisions are still driven by your thinking. You have strong interaction design instincts and think in systems and flows, not just individual screens. You are intrinsically motivated and thrive in a remote environment.

Bonus points if you have

Prior exposure to crypto, consumer-facing applications, and/or gaming interfaces

Experience building or contributing to a design system early on

Some background in user research or usability testing

An eye for motion and microinteractions that make dense UIs feel alive

What success looks like

In your first few months, you'll have continued to maintain the design system, owned end-to-end design for at least two major product surfaces, and built a design rhythm with the founding team that keeps quality high as we move quickly. Over time, you'll become the design standard-bearer for Longshot, and as the team grows, you'll help define what great design looks like.

What We Offer

Meaningful ownership with significant equity as the first design hire

Direct access to founders with a real voice in product direction from day one

A fully remote, high-trust environment where you own your work

Real impact: your designs ship to real users quickly



 me at 
 with your portfolio if interested

title: Sales & Tech Representative
description:
We’re Hiring!!!



Are you a skilled salesperson with a background in gas plumbing and/or electrical work? Do you enjoy helping customers find the right solution while using your technical knowledge? Join our growing team and work with a US online home goods retailer that values expertise, professionalism, and customer satisfaction.





Position:

Sales & Tech Representative – Technical Products (Gas & Electrical Focus)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Schedule: Monday-Friday, 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM EST (40 hours/week)

Salary: Competitive + Performance Bonuses





About the Role:

As a Salesperson, you will assist customers with product selection, provide technical support during the sales process, and close sales with confidence. You’ll work with gas fireplaces, heaters, stoves, and other appliances, so previous hands-on experience or technical knowledge of gas or electrical systems is a MUST.





Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Help customers choose the right gas or electric heating appliance for their needs

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

Explain technical specifications and installation requirements in simple terms

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them





Requirements:

Sales Experience – 2+ years, preferably with B2C or B2B technical products

Gas Plumbing or Electrical Experience – Formal training or work experience (installer, technician, or similar roles preferred)

Excellent English – Both written and spoken

Confident Communicator – Can explain complex concepts to non-technical customers

Tech-Savvy – Comfortable using CRMs,
 platforms, order tools, etc.

Reliable and Proactive – Takes initiative and works independently

Home Office Setup – Stable internet, noise-free environment, backup power is a plus





Preferred but Not Required:

Knowledge of venting, HVAC, or hearth appliances

US product or code familiarity

Experience in the construction or home improvement industry





Why Join Us?

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping cost. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position





How to Apply:

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph with the subject line: "Sales Pro - [Your Name]"

title: Interior Designer (Full-Time, Remote) – Build Magical Spaces for a Global Hospitality Brand
description:
We’re looking for a full-time Interior Designer to join a fast-growing hospitality brand that builds immersive, story-driven spaces, often described as the Disney of short stays.



This is not a freelance or side-hustle role.



This is a full-time, exclusive position for a designer who wants to fully commit to one brand, own projects end-to-end, and build a long-term creative career.



If you’re looking to juggle multiple clients or keep other professional commitments, this role will not be the right fit.





About the Role:



You will be the sole Interior Designer responsible for running design projects from start to finish.



That means you will:



- Lead each project from concept to final delivery

- Drive timelines, milestones, and 
ntum

- Run kick-offs, reviews, and design sessions

- Own modelling, layouts, FF&E, and specifications

- Proactively push projects forward without being chased

- Collaborate with a creative director for vision and alignment



You won’t be given tasks.

You’ll be given ownership.





Exclusivity & Focus (Important):



This role requires full professional focus.





We’re looking for someone who:



- Treats this as their only professional design role

- Does not take on other client work or employment

- Wants to invest their creative energy into building one brand deeply

- Thinks and operates as if this were their own business



We believe the quality and pace of work we’re aiming for is only possible with complete focus and commitment.





The Kind of Designer We’re Looking For



This role is for someone who:

- Thinks like an owner, not an employee

- Is highly proactive and self-driven

- Is comfortable being the single point of responsibility

- Is responsive and reliable in fast-moving environments

- Takes pride in their work and their craft

- Wants to build a long-term career, not just complete jobs



We care far more about ownership, judgement, and 
ntum than about where you studied or how many years you’ve worked.



How We Work:



- Fully remote

- Outcome-driven

- High autonomy, high trust

- Fast-moving projects

- Real creative freedom



The only strict expectation is responsiveness when tagged or messaged, because that’s how projects keep moving.





Compensation Structure



- Monthly base pay

- Plus a performance-based bonus per project onboarded



High performers are directly rewarded for the projects they successfully deliver.



Exact figures will be discussed with shortlisted candidates.





What Success Looks Like



In your first 90 days, you’ll be:



- Running multiple projects independently

- Driving timelines without being prompted

- Producing high-quality, immersive designs

- Becoming the creative owner of our spaces





How to Apply



Please include:



- A link to your portfolio

- A short video answering these questions, uploaded to a public google drive link:



“This role requires full professional focus with no other work commitments. Why does that suit you at this stage of your career?” and "If someone was to tell you, you were going to join the Disney of the short-stay industry, how would that make you feel?"





If you’re looking for a place to truly own your craft and grow long-term, we’d love to hear from you.

description:

Applications that do not follow these instructions will be ignored.

title: Floor Plan Editor
description:
Full-time | 40 hours per week | 7:30 AM–4:00 PM ACDT | Adelaide, South Australia



Clique Creative is South Australia’s go-to for top-tier photography, videography, and marketing services. Our vision is to craft and inspire high-quality, consistent marketing solutions for property, people, and projects—while delivering a premium customer experience and fostering a fun, supportive workplace.



We’re looking for a highly skilled and detail-driven Floor Plan Editor to join our vibrant team. This position is a work-from-home position, working 40 hours per week, Monday to Friday, 7:00AM to 3:00PM ACDT, in alignment with our production and scheduling needs. 



As the Floor Plan Editor, you will play a central role in keeping our production pipeline running smoothly each day. A key component of your work involves quality controlling floor plans each day for accuracy, completing edits in Adobe Illustrator, forecasting workloads, and ensuring all outputs meet client and agency standards.  This is a very important part of our business and floor plan accuracy is paramount.



Key Responsibilities - Floor Plan Quality Control:

- Conduct daily checks on floor plans for accuracy, consistency, and compliance with standards.

- Complete edits in Adobe Illustrator software.

- Forecast upcoming floor plan workloads and assess resource needs.

- Identify, record, and communicate discrepancies or design issues.

- Maintain workflow efficiency to meet strict daily deadlines.



About You

You will succeed in this role if you:



- Have excellent English, written and verbal

- Have exceptional attention to detail.

- Have 3 years minimum experience in a similar position.

- Are confident using Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator.

- Are comfortable with Google Drive, Gmail, and Mac/iOS systems.

- Are highly organised and efficient with task prioritisation.

- Thrive in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment.

- Enjoy interacting with clients and colleagues.

- Work well independently and as part of a supportive team.

- (Bonus) Have experience or interest in architecture, drafting, or design.



Why Join Clique Creative?



- Join a fun, supportive, and passionate creative team.

- Work in an environment that values quality, innovation, consistency, and teamwork.

- Enjoy a varied role with opportunities to grow your operational and creative skills.

- Be part of a well-regarded creative services company supporting property, people, and projects across South Australia.



How to Apply



If you’re ready to join a dynamic, quality-driven creative team, we’d love to hear from you.

Please submit your CV and a brief cover letter to Alex Perez at 
 outlining why you’re the right fit for this role.

title: GoHighLevel EXPERT
description:
We are a marketing agency.

We need a GoHighLevel expert to build and manage the full backend system for our clinic clients. This is a long-term full-time position with room to grow as we scale.



*What you will be building and managing:



CRM setup with custom pipelines and contact fields for each client

SMS and
 drip sequences (speed-to-lead, nurture, appointment reminders, no-show recovery, re-engagement)

Automated workflows (lead comes in from
 ad ? instant SMS fires ?
 fires ? lead enters pipeline ? notifications sent)

Calendar and booking system setup with Google Calendar sync

Missed call text-back configuration

Reputation management workflows (automated Google review requests after appointments)

Reporting dashboards for clients

Deploying GHL snapshots to new client sub-accounts and customizing for each clinic

Troubleshooting broken workflows and maintaining system health



Requirements:



Minimum 1 year using GoHighLevel daily (not just watching tutorials — actually building workflows and automations for clients)

Experience building SMS and
 sequences

Comfortable with Zapier or Make for occasional external integrations

Reliable internet and available during US business hours (EST preferred, some overlap required)

Strong written English for writing SMS and
 templates



EXTRA:

Experience with Meta Ads and CAPI Integrations - Tracking Meta Ad Performance with GHL



This is a full-time role. You will start by building our master client template (snapshot) and then deploy and manage it for each new clinic we onboard. As we grow you will be our go-to person for everything inside GoHighLevel.

title: Automotive Operations and Dispatch Coordinator
description:
Key Responsibilities



1. Fleet & Retail Ops Coordination

*Own the estimate-to-approval-to-route workflow:

*Create and submit estimates

*Follow up for approval

*Ensure parts are sourced

*Finalize tech routes for the following day

*Track all jobs in progress and flag issues proactively

*Ensure routes are realistic and efficient; confirm techs are prepped and ready

*Communicate clearly with customers and fleet managers about job timing, status, and follow-ups

*Submit and close out fleet approvals in Element, LeasePlan, and AutoIntegrate

*Ensure invoices match approvals; follow up on outstanding invoices and missing payments



2. Scheduling & Productivity Tracking

*Maintain the daily technician schedule, making updates as needed

*Monitor tech productivity; flag idle time, reschedules, or delays

*Track time logs and coordinate with bookkeeper for payroll



3. Customer Communication

*Respond to incoming texts, WhatsApp messages, and system inquiries in a timely, professional manner

*Follow up with clients as needed to resolve open issues or gather job-related info

*Escalate concerns appropriately and promptly



4. Admin & Reporting

*Submit a detailed Daily Recap covering completed work, pending tasks, blockers, and KPIs

*Keep Trello and other tools up-to-date with accurate job and task statuses

*Track inventory needs and coordinate ordering of parts, oil, and supplies

*Monitor A/R and follow up on past-due fleet invoices



5. Marketing & Content Support

*Publish our monthly newsletter in MailChimp with content from marketing team

*Coordinate publishing of content to Instagram /
 / Google My Business

*Other light admin support as needed for the marketing team



What Success Looks Like

*All work orders, estimates, approvals, and tech routes are handled with zero dropped balls

*You identify blockers or problems before they become fires

*Communication is clear, timely, and professional — with both customers and internal team

*The business runs like a machine — nothing gets missed or delayed

*You take full ownership of your responsibilities and require very little follow-up



Who You Are

*A natural systems thinker who thrives on clarity, organization, and ownership

*Extremely proactive — you don’t wait to be told what to do

*Excellent at written and verbal English communication

*Comfortable in the automotive world and eager to learn the details

*Sharp and reliable — you retain info, spot gaps, and follow through



Experience & Skills Required

*3+ years of experience in a remote automotive: coordinator, dispatcher, operations role

*Demonstrated responsibility for keeping things moving without handholding

*Excellent written and spoken English

*Experience with dispatch, route planning, or technician scheduling

*Familiar with tools like Slack, Google Docs, Trello (or similar), CRM/invoicing platforms

*Experience working with U.S.-based field service, auto, or fleet companies

*Bonus: Familiarity with AutoIntegrate, Housecall Pro, Element, or LeasePlan platforms



Required Software Experience

*Slack

*WhatsApp

*Trello (or similar)

*Google Workspace

*CRM / invoicing tools (Housecall Pro, AutoIntegrate)

* Monday . com (plus)



TECH REQUIREMENTS:

*Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed

*Dual monitor setup is required to ensure efficiency in managing multiple applications simultaneously.

*Location: Remote (Philippines)

*Schedule: Part-time or Full-time, US hours



*Part-time Schedule

**Tuesday 1-5 pm

**Wednesday 1-5 pm

**Friday 8:30 - 7:30 pm

**Saturday 10-4 pm

**Sunday 2-5 pm



*Full-time Schedule

**Monday to Friday 9:30AM -6:30PM

Pay: Php288.46 - Php432.69 hourly rate



Application Instructions:

Fill out this form: 

After submitting the form, click the apply button and send us a short message on why you would be a good fit for the role.

title: Sales Person
description:
We are looking for a Sales Person who is experienced but at the same time willing to learn and listen to new sales techniques.



The company you’ll be representing is a well-established catering company based in Maryland, known for delivering exceptional culinary experiences and outstanding service. You’ll work closely with the CEO and will be trained by her on how to win deals.



Responsibilities:

++ Identify and pursue new sales opportunities through inbound leads, referrals, and outbound outreach

++ Build and maintain strong, long-term customer relationships

++ Prepare and deliver persuasive presentations and proposals

++ Bring potential customers through the sales process and close contracts to meet or exceed sales targets

++ Track and manage sales activity using CRM tools



Qualifications:

>> Proven experience in sales with a strong record of closing deals

>> Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills

>> Positive, coachable attitude and a willingness to adopt new strategies

>> Highly organized, self-motivated, and goal-driven

>> Must be available to work Eastern Time (ET) hours



If you’re an experienced salesperson who’s open to learning new techniques and enjoys helping clients bring their events to life, we’d love to hear from you. Please include "I am your deal maker" in the subject line of your response.



Also, please answer the following questions:

1. What types of companies have you supported as a Sales Person?

2. Based on your answer in number 1, what were your responsibilities?

3. Please share an example of a time when you successfully closed a major deal.

4. For you, what is the hardest part of being a Sales Person?

5. How much is your hourly rate?

6. Can you commit in working ET hours?

title: N8N Web Developer
description:
We're looking for a skilled N8N Developer to design, build, and maintain complex automation workflows. You'll integrate APIs, manage environment migrations, and build automation solutions that scale.



Requirements:



> N8N

Hands-on experience with the N8N automation platform

Proven track record building complex, multi-step workflows



> APIs & MCP 

Proven experience working with REST APIs and third-party integrations

Familiarity with MCP (Model Context Protocol) and AI-driven integrations



> Environment Management 

Experience migrating workflows between Development and Production environments

Understanding of environment variables, version control, and deployment best practices



Nice to Have (but not required):

Experience with Supabase (database, auth, or edge functions)



Skills

a. Critical thinking and strong problem-solving ability

b. Resourceful and solution-oriented with ambiguous requirements

c. Strong async communication for remote collaboration



The Role:

* Part-time, flexible hours within the Philippines timezone (PHT)

* Fully remote



Please answer the following when you apply:

1. Describe a complex N8N workflow you've built. What was the use case, how many nodes did it involve, and what was the biggest challenge you solved?

2. Walk us through how you handle migrating an N8N workflow from a development environment to production. What steps do you take to ensure nothing breaks?

3. Tell us about a time an API integration didn't go as planned. How did you diagnose the issue and what did you do to fix it?

4. How much is your hourly rate?

title: Virtual assistant

title: Social Media Manager – Paediatric Speech Therapy Clinic
description:
We are looking for a creative and reliable Social Media Manager to grow and manage our Instagram presence for a pediatric speech therapy business.



This role is perfect for someone who understands content strategy, aesthetics, and audience engagement, and is passionate about creating meaningful and educational content.



Responsibilities

- Plan, create, and schedule consistent Instagram content (posts, reels, stories)

- Develop engaging and educational content related to:

- Pediatric speech therapy

- Language development tips

- Parent education

- Write captions that are engaging, informative, and aligned with our brand voice

- Design and maintain a consistent and aesthetically pleasing Instagram feed

- Stay up to date with Instagram trends, reels, and algorithm changes

- Identify optimal posting times and strategies for growth

- Manage hashtags, engagement, and basic community interaction (comments, DMs if required)

- Assist with promotions, ads, and boosting posts



Requirements

- Proven experience managing Instagram accounts (please provide examples)

- Strong understanding of:

- Instagram algorithm

- Content strategy & growth

- Reels and short-form video trends

- Ability to create visually appealing content (Canva or similar tools)

- Basic knowledge of social media marketing and advertising

- Creative thinker with initiative (able to suggest ideas independently)

- Strong English communication skills



Bonus (not required but highly valued):

- Experience in healthcare, education, or pediatric content

- Video editing skills (CapCut, InShot, etc.)



What We’re Looking For

- Someone creative, proactive, and organised

- Someone who can take ownership and bring fresh ideas regularly

- Someone who understands how to turn educational content into engaging content

title: Nurse Advocate
description:
We are seeking a Remote Nurse Advocate to provide high-quality patient support and ensure smooth delivery of mental health services. This role focuses on patient communication, appointment coordination, case documentation, and assistance with forms, pharmacy issues, telepsychiatry processes, and care navigation.



Responsibilities



Provide empathetic emotional support to patients throughout their treatment.



Assist patients with registration, onboarding, and understanding telepsychiatry platforms.



Help complete disability forms and support physicians with accommodation letters.



Coordinate lab work appointments and assist patients in obtaining medical records.



Guide patients through pharmacy or prescription-related issues.



Resolve support escalations through Zoom calls or virtual communication.



Advocate for patient rights, needs, and access to care.



Manage appointment scheduling, rescheduling, and notifications of any changes.



Assist with out-of-network claims and respond to billing or payment-related queries.



Maintain accurate documentation of patient interactions and provider schedules.



Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams and coordinate care with external providers.



Identify and communicate opportunities to improve patient care and service delivery.



Requirements



Degree in Psychology, Social Work, Healthcare Administration, Nursing, Pharmacist or a related field.



Minimum 5 years of experience as a Patient Advocate, Clinical Coordinator, or similar role.



Excellent English communication skills (C1 level).



Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to engage compassionately with diverse patient populations.



High attention to detail with strong organizational and documentation skills.



Knowledge of mental health conditions and treatment modalities (preferred).



Familiarity with telehealth platforms and virtual care technologies.



Ability to work independently and as part of a team of four, take the initiative, and maintain strict confidentiality.



This position is not focused on backend tasks; the candidate should be comfortable working one-on-one with doctors.



Availability to work from 9 AM to 6 PM EST, Monday–Friday or Sunday–Thursday.

title: HR Assistant
description:
Location: 100% Remote 

Department: Human Resources

Reports To: Managing Director



About the Role



The HR Assistant supports the Human Resources department with both administrative HR operations and recruitment activities. This role is ideal for an experienced HR professional who is detail-oriented, service-driven, and motivated to continue growing across core HR functions. The HR Assistant helps ensure smooth HR processes, efficient hiring, and a positive personnel experience throughout the personnel lifecycle.



This is a remote position, and we welcome candidates who are passionate about people, process improvement, and collaborative teamwork.



Key Responsibilities



HR Operations & Administration:

Maintain accurate, up-to-date, and compliant personnel records within HR systems and personnel files.

Independently manage day-to-day HR administrative processes and documentation.

Support the implementation and consistent application of HR policies, procedures, and internal guidelines.

Assist with ensuring compliance with labor laws, company policies, and HR best practices.

Prepare and validate personnel data for payroll processing, including attendance, leave records, and personnel changes.

Support benefits and leave administration and serve as a first point of contact for routine personnel inquiries.

Support personnel separation processes, including coordinating exit documentation, system access removal, final payroll inputs, and exit interviews in line with company policy.

Coordinate performance review cycles, training initiatives, and personnel engagement activities.

Prepare HR reports, trackers, and documentation for management and audits as required.

Handle sensitive personnel information with discretion, professionalism, and confidentiality.



Recruitment & Talent Acquisition Support:

Partner with managers to understand staffing needs and role requirements.

Draft, post, and manage job advertisements across job boards, social media, and company career pages.

Screen resumes and conduct initial candidate interviews as needed.

Coordinate interview schedules and manage ongoing candidate communication and follow-ups.

Maintain and update the applicant tracking system and monitor recruitment metrics.

Support onboarding preparation and processes, including employment documentation and orientation coordination.

Contribute to improving recruitment workflows and candidate experience.



Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Psychology, or a related field.

1-2 years of relevant experience in Human Resources, with exposure to both HR operations and recruitment.

Working knowledge of HR processes, employment practices, and applicable labor regulations.

Strong interpersonal and communication skills with the ability to interact confidently with personnel and managers.

Proficiency in Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Slides), and hands-on experience using HR and recruitment tools such as Gusto, Indeed, LinkedIn, etc. 

Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities effectively.



Preferred Skills: 

Experience using sourcing platforms such as LinkedIn Recruiter, Indeed, or similar tools.

Ability to work independently while collaborating effectively with cross-functional teams.

Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.



Key Competencies: 

Professionalism and integrity

Accountability and ownership

Time management and prioritization

Adaptability and continuous learning

Strong personnel service mindset



Why Join Us

- 100% Remote Work Environment

- Supportive, people-first culture

- Opportunities for growth and professional development

- Employee recognition and engagement programs

title: Content Quality Analyst
description:
We’re hiring a Content Quality Analyst to help ensure the quality and consistency of web content across our firm’s website. This junior-level role is well-suited for someone who’s detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable working within legal subject matters. You should be confident reviewing content with a critical eye, open to learning, and willing to speak up when you spot issues or areas for improvement. You’ll also work with other teams to keep everything consistent and up to standard across the site. A legal background isn’t required, but the ability to understand legal concepts and apply established guidelines accurately is essential.



Key Responsibilities

-Review web content for legal marketing compliance, factual and conceptual accuracy, grammar, and readability.

-Conduct regular audits of web pages for both content and technical issues.

-Ensure SEO best practices are implemented throughout all content (keywords, meta tags, headers, etc.).

-Perform basic technical checks (e.g., internal links, alt text, metadata, formatting).

-Coordinate with different teams to ensure consistent application of content standards.

-Track content updates and maintain documentation of reviews and recommendations.

-Support the development of internal content standards and style guides.



Qualifications And Skills

-Excellent attention to detail and the ability to identify content inconsistencies or errors.

-Strong organizational and time management skills.

-Ability to follow complex editorial, legal, and brand standards accurately.

-Fast learner with the ability to adapt to legal content and digital platforms.

-Strong written communication and analytical skills.

-Familiarity with legal terminology, especially in the U.S. legal landscape (preferred).

-Understanding of basic website development concepts such as HTML tags and page structure (preferred).



Basic Requirements

-Device Specifications: Intel i5 processor or higher with a minimum of 8GB RAM

-Equipment: Webcam, speakers, and a microphone or headphones

-Internet Speed: Minimum of 100Mbps with a backup connection in case of outages



Work Details

Working Hours: Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 5:30 PM Pacific Standard Time | Tuesday to Saturday, 12 AM to 8:30 AM Manila Time



Location: Anywhere in the Philippines



Why Join Us?

-Stable employment

-Competitive salary

-Bi-monthly salary

-A-Z benefits, including bonuses and annual raises

-Work-life balance

-Work-from-home opportunity



If interested, kindly send your resume to 



Start Your Journey With Us

If you enjoy working behind the scenes to make sure content is clear, accurate, and up to standard, this role might be a strong match. You're the kind of person who notices the small things, like an awkward phrase, a broken link, a detail that doesn’t quite add up, and you take pride in getting it right. You’ll be part of a collaborative team that values quality and attention to detail, steady support, and room to grow in a stable, long-term role. If that sounds like the kind of environment you’re looking for, we’d like to hear from you.

title: Administrative Golf Travel & Booking Systems (with option to full time)
description:
About YouGolfTours

YouGolfTours is a boutique golf travel company specialised in high-quality, tailor-made golf journeys worldwide. We work with discerning clients, premium hotels, golf resorts and international partners, placing strong emphasis on service quality, precision and personal attention.



Our business model combines strong B2C outbound expertise in Switzerland with B2B inbound operations for Swiss golf travel. Our products cover FIT travel (individuals, couples and families), group travel with or without a golf professional, as well as incentive and corporate travel where business, golf and premium experiences are combined.



Role overview

We are looking for a reliable, structured and engaged administrative professional to support management and daily operations, with a strong focus on booking systems, website admin, CRM admin, coordination and communication. This role requires solid administrative experience who works independently, communicates confidently with international partners and understands executive-level organisation. Knowledge of the golf and tourism industry is essential to fully understand our products, workflows and client expectations.



Key responsibilities

You will support the management team with CRM, Website admin, CMS, system-related, booking and general administrative tasks and act as a central coordination point for internal and external communication. This includes handling
s and correspondence in English, preparing business and operational documents, managing data, supplier information and bookings, and supporting the organisation of travel arrangements, meetings and executive schedules. You will liaise with hotels, golf courses, airlines and partners, ensuring accuracy, follow-up and clear communication at all times. Maintaining structured records and supporting smooth operational processes will be a key part of your role.



Required profile

You are fluent in English, written and spoken, and confident in professional Web, online Admin and communication. You bring solid administrative experience, ideally within tourism, travel, hospitality or a comparable service-driven environment. You are highly organised, detail-oriented and comfortable managing multiple tasks simultaneously. A good understanding of the golf industry and the tourism business is important, as is experience with executive arrangements and high-level client coordination. You work independently, reliably and with a strong sense of responsibility.



What we offer

We offer a flexible part-time position with the possibility to work also Full Time after trial period, integration into a dynamic and specialised golf travel company, and close collaboration with management. You will be involved in high-quality international projects and premium client services. This is a purely administrative role. 



We are looking for a long-term collaboration based on engagement and mutual growth.

title: Video Editor (Gig to Part Time)
description:

The Project:

4 short-form vertical videos (9:16) ranging from 15–90 seconds each. Footage will include cinematic b-roll and on-site interviews. Turnaround, edits need to be delivered within 10 days of the shoot date, with up to 2 rounds of revisions following.



For ongoing work:

The type of videos will range from event sizzle reels, to social media videos, to commercial work. The candidate should be comfortable editing for varying styles and outcomes.



What I'm Looking For:

2. Comfortable editing and coloring sony SLOG footage

3. Have strong attention to detail with error free delivery

4. Experience with a professional level software (preferably adobe)

5. Familiarity with newer social media and AI editing software (e.g. Capcut, Opus Clip, and Eleven Labs)



Timeline:

The shoot is mid April so editing should commence shortly after.



If this seems like a good fit, I'd love to hear from you. I run a video production company in Austin, TX (JTX Media).

title: Full-Time YouTube Video Editor (Long-Form Content)
description:
HIRING: Full-Time YouTube Video Editor (Long-Form Content)



Remote / Overseas



We’re hiring a full-time YouTube editor to produce long-form videos for an entrepreneurship and business channel.



The channel focuses on building real businesses from the ground up, including:



• Airbnb / Real Estate

• Consumer Product Brands

• Restaurants & Breweries

• Entrepreneurship & Business Strategy



This is a 40-hour/week role focused primarily on long-form YouTube videos (8–20 minutes).



This is not a part-time editing role.

We are looking for someone who can own the editing process and help improve the storytelling of each video.



Please
 your resume and portfolio to apply.



What You’ll Do



• Edit long-form YouTube videos (8–20 minutes)

• Turn raw footage into clear, engaging stories

• Improve pacing and viewer retention throughout the video

• Cut filler and tighten dialogue

• Add B-roll, images, charts, and visual context when helpful

• Add captions, graphics, and motion elements where appropriate

• Source supporting visuals when needed

• Help structure videos so they hold viewer attention



You will also:



• Create YouTube Shorts from long-form content

• Prepare videos for upload

• Export final files for YouTube publishing

• Collaborate on improving video structure and storytelling



What You Must Have



• Strong experience editing YouTube long-form videos



• Portfolio showing high-quality storytelling and pacing



• Proficiency in:



Premiere Pro

Final Cut

CapCut

DaVinci Resolve



(or similar professional editing software)



• Understanding of YouTube viewer retention



• Ability to edit clean, professional content (not over-edited)



• Strong English comprehension



• Reliable internet and consistent availability



• Ability to overlap 3–4 hours daily with U.S. Eastern Time



What This Role Is NOT



? Not part-time

? Not a beginner role

? Not just cutting clips together

? Not a “learning on the job” position



You should already know how to edit engaging YouTube content.



What Success Looks Like



• Videos are delivered on schedule

• Editing improves pacing and clarity

• Viewer retention improves over time

• Videos feel professional and engaging

• Leadership doesn’t need to micromanage edits



How to Apply



Please send:

 1. A short summary of your YouTube editing experience

 2. Links to videos you’ve personally edited

 3. The software you use for editing

 4. Any examples of long-form content (10+ minutes) you’ve edited

title: Senior WordPress & Webflow Website Developer

* Configure themes, templates, custom fields, and page-builder layouts to match design comps

* Domain, Hosting & Deployment

* Manage DNS settings, SSL certificates, hosting environments (staging & production), and backups

* Oversee deployment workflows and rollback procedures

* Custom Front-End Enhancements

* Write clean, maintainable JavaScript, HTML, and CSS for animations, sliders, and form validations

* Implement lightweight scripts to extend CMS functionality without heavy back-end work

* Integrations & Automations

* Connect sites to
-marketing tools (Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign), CRMs (GoHighLevel), payment gateways, and Zapier/Integromat

* Configure and test webhooks and RESTful API calls for seamless data flow

* Performance, Security & SEO

* Optimize images, implement caching and minification for fast load times

* Ensure on-page SEO fundamentals are in place (meta tags, structured data, sitemap)

* Harden sites against common vulnerabilities (XSS, SQL injection, brute-force)

* Collaboration & Version Control

* Partner with designers, marketers, and PMs to translate requirements into scalable solutions

* Maintain code in Git, perform peer reviews, and uphold branching/merging workflows

* Quality Assurance & Maintenance

* Conduct manual (and where feasible, automated) testing to catch regressions

* Troubleshoot, debug, and provide post-launch support—including uptime monitoring and error-log reviews

* Documentation & Client Handoff

* Prepare step-by-step documentation and training materials for client site management

* Provide a 30-day post-launch support window and live handover sessions

* Continuous Improvement

* Research and recommend new tools or processes to boost efficiency and quality

* Share knowledge via internal demos or lunch-and-learn sessions







Nice-to-Have: Mentoring junior developers; experience with Jira/Trello; familiarity with Google Analytics/Tag Manager.

Qualifications



* 5+ years of professional experience in WordPress and Webflow website development

* Advanced skills with Elementor, Divi, ACF, and Webflow CMS

* Strong command of JavaScript, HTML, and CSS for front-end customizations

* Proven track record integrating third-party services via APIs and webhooks

* Deep understanding of DNS, SSL, hosting platforms, and deployment workflows

* Proficient with Git and collaborative development practices

* Excellent English communication—written and verbal

* Highly organized, detail-oriented, and self-motivated in a remote setting





Performance Review & Increase: After a 3-month probationary period and successful milestone delivery, we’ll conduct a formal review with the opportunity to increase base pay toward mid-market rates.



* Benefits & Perks

* Paid Time Off (PTO):

* Earn 40 hours of PTO after completing one full year of employment.

* After three years, your PTO increases to 60 hours annually.

* Unused PTO can roll over, up to a maximum of 80 hours.

* Paid Holidays:

Enjoy paid time off for all major U.S. holidays, including:

* New Year’s Eve & New Year’s Day

* Memorial Day

* Independence Day

* Labor Day

* Thanksgiving Day & the day after

* Christmas Eve & Christmas Day

* Performance Review & Salary Growth:

* Formal review after the 3-month probationary period

* Opportunity for base pay increase based on performance and milestone completion

* Remote Work Culture:

* 100% remote with structured hours and clear expectations

* Collaborative team culture with regular video calls and project alignment



How to Apply

Please submit via OnlineJobs.ph:



1. Your résumé/CV

2. Links to 3 live sites or repositories demonstrating your WordPress, Webflow, and custom JS/CSS work

3. A brief cover note outlining your role in each project and confirming your availability for 9 AM–6 PM US CST



Or submit into our applicant pipeline using this link: 
/forms/84726ed1ba31277ce11ad4495f9b8f6f?r=use1

title: PRODUCTION COORDINATOR SORORITY APPAREL
description:
PRODUCTION COORDINATOR

We're hiring an experienced Production Coordinator to manage the behind-the-scenes operations that keep our orders moving. This is a hands-on role that sits at the center of our supplier relationships, order flow, and production quality.

We specialize in custom apparel for college sororities and fraternities across the United States. Greek life organizations operate on tight, event-driven timelines — think Bid Day, recruitment week, formal season, and chapter events — where hundreds to thousands of garments need to be produced, approved, and delivered within strict windows. There is very little room for error, and the pace is unlike most apparel businesses.

This role is only open to candidates currently working or with direct past experience in the Greek apparel industry. If you have not worked with sorority or fraternity clients in a production, operations, or sourcing capacity, please do not apply.

Your day-to-day will include:



Communicating directly with suppliers and overseas factories

Placing, organizing, and tracking orders end-to-end

Sourcing materials and products based on client needs

Reviewing design files before production to ensure accuracy and quality

Organizing and packaging information for suppliers to minimize errors and delays

Coordinating approvals, revisions, timelines, and deadlines

Managing MOQs, lead times, and production limitations across multiple orders simultaneously



This role requires strong organizational skills, sharp attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple supplier relationships without things slipping through the cracks.

Compensation is based on experience.

title: Image Annotator — Sports AI (Padel) | Remote | Full-Time (40 hrs/week) | Long-Term
description:
# About the Role



We're a sports AI company building computer vision technology for padel (a racquet sport similar to tennis). We need a detail-oriented annotator to review and correct AI-generated annotations on match footage. Our tools do most of the heavy lifting — your job is to make sure the output is accurate.



This is a long-term, full-time position with room to grow into a QA or team lead role as we scale.





# What You'll Do



- Review and correct AI-generated bounding boxes around players on a padel court (typically 4 players per frame)

- Track ball position frame-by-frame using our custom click-to-advance tool

- Flag any frames where the AI output is clearly wrong or the ball is not visible

- Maintain high accuracy and consistency across long annotation sessions

- Communicate progress and questions to the team via Slack or 

- Meet daily output targets while keeping quality high

- Fully remote, flexible hours. We care about output, not when you're online

- A small, transparent team where your work has direct impact on the product



# Requirements



Must Have:

- Strong attention to detail, this is the most important quality

- A desktop or laptop computer with a proper mouse (not trackpad)

- Stable internet connection

- Available to work 40 hours per week

- Proficient in English for written communication

- Self-motivated and comfortable working independently from home

- Comfortable with repetitive, focused screen work



Nice to Have:



- Previous experience with image annotation, data labeling, or similar tasks

- Familiarity with annotation tools (CVAT, Labelbox, Label Studio, or similar)

- Interest in or knowledge of racquet sports (padel, tennis, squash)

- Experience with video or frame-by-frame review tasks

- Previous remote work experience



What We Offer



- Fully remote, work from home

- Consistent schedule with reasonable flexibility

- Long-term, stable position, not a one-off project

- Full training provided on our annotation tools, no prior annotation experience required

- Opportunity to grow into QA reviewer or team lead as the team expands

- Work on cutting-edge sports AI technology



# How to Apply



Please send a message including:



- A short introduction about yourself

- What computer and mouse setup you use at home

- Your internet speed (you can check at speedtest.net)

- Any relevant experience (annotation, data entry, QA, or similar detail-focused work)

- Whether you have any familiarity with padel, tennis, or racquet sports

- Your earliest available start date



We will provide a short paid test task as part of the hiring process.

Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis.

title: Systems & Automation Specialist
description:
SYSTEMS & AUTOMATION SPECIALIST

Full-Time | Remote | Hours: 9:00am - 5:00pm CST (Non-Negotiable)





ABOUT US



We're a fast-growing digital marketing agency managing 150+ active clients across SEO, paid ads, and website services. Our team is lean, remote-first, and moves fast. We don't have room for people who need hand-holding — but we absolutely take care of the people who show up and deliver.





THE ROLE



We're looking for a Marketing Operations & Automation Specialist who lives in the intersection of systems, websites, and data. You'll be the person who keeps our tech stack humming — building workflows, launching sites correctly, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks operationally.



This is not a creative role. This is an execution role for someone who genuinely enjoys making things work and has a strong attention to detail.





WHAT YOU'LL OWN



- Building, managing, and optimizing automation workflows in GoHighLevel (GHL) and Zapier

- Supporting website builds and updates in WordPress using Elementor

- Setting up and verifying Google Tag Manager containers and triggers for new site launches

- Configuring Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and ensuring proper tracking is in place before sites go live

- Coordinating pre-launch checklists to ensure every client site is technically sound

- Identifying broken workflows or tracking gaps and fixing them proactively





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Proven, hands-on experience with GoHighLevel — workflows, pipelines, automations, and review tools

- Strong Zapier skills — you know how to connect platforms cleanly and troubleshoot when Zaps break

- Comfortable working in WordPress and Elementor — not a developer, but not afraid of the backend either

- Working knowledge of Google Tag Manager and GA4 setup and configuration

- Detail-oriented — you check your work before handing it off

- Reliable, communicative, and self-directed during your shift

- Excellent written English





REQUIREMENTS



- Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience in a marketing ops or automation role

- Must be available and actively working 9:00am - 5:00pm CST, Monday through Friday — this is a firm requirement, not flexible

- Stable internet connection and a professional remote setup

- Please include the word "Workflow" at the start of your application so we know you read this carefully





COMPENSATION



Competitive and based on experience. Long-term position with room to grow as the agency scales.





**If you've used GHL to build an automation you're proud of, tell us about it in your application. That's the kind of detail that gets you an interview.

title: Short Form Video Editor (Reels/Shorts/TikTok) – Finance Brand – Long Term
description:
We are a fast growing finance/markets education brand (Bull Market Blueprint – BMB) creating daily content for Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and TikTok. We’re looking for 1–2 reliable short form video editors from the Philippines for a long-term role focused on simple but well executed reel cutdowns from long form content.



This is NOT a one off gig. We want someone who can grow with us and edit content every week.



Responsibilities

- Take long form videos (talking-head finance/business content, screen recordings, webinars) and turn them into 20–60 second clips.

- Add clean, readable captions optimized for mobile (we provide references + templates).

- Add basic pattern interrupts: jump cuts, punch-ins, zooms, simple sound emphasis, light B-roll when needed.

- Export in vertical 9:16 format (Reels/Shorts/TikTok ready).

- Work in batches (for example, 10–20 clips from one long video).

- Deliver on time consistently and be responsive on chat during agreed hours.



What this job is NOT

- Not heavy After Effects or complex motion graphics.

- Not cinematic edits or full YouTube documentaries.

- Not random projects; this is ongoing, systemized work.



Requirements

- Proven experience editing short-form vertical content (Reels/Shorts/TikTok). Please have links ready.

- Strong sense of pacing for educational / talking?head videos.

- Good English comprehension; you must catch obvious grammar/spelling mistakes in captions.

- Comfortable following a preset/template so you can edit quickly and consistently.

- Stable internet connection and a decent computer for video editing.

- Software: Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro (CapCut can be a plus but not as the only tool).

- Experience editing finance, business, or coaching/creator content.

- Familiarity with YouTube/IG/TikTok best practices for hooks, text size, etc.



Work Schedule & Volume

- We are flexible on exact hours as long as deadlines are hit.

- Expect 30–60 shorts per month to start (20–60 sec each), with potential to increase if we’re a good fit.

- Long?term role: we are looking for someone who wants stable, ongoing work.



Salary / Compensation

- Please propose your expected MONTHLY salary in PHP for:

- Part-time: ~20–30 hours/week, 30–60 shorts per month.

- We are open to performance-based increases after the first 1–3 months based on reliability, speed, and quality.



How to Apply

1. Make sure your Onlinejobs.ph profile is complete with your work history and skills.

2. Fill out this short application form (required): 


 

3. In your message here on Onlinejobs.ph, include:

- Subject line: “Short-Form Editor – BMB”

- 2–3 sentences about your experience with Reels/Shorts/TikTok

- Your expected monthly salary (PHP) for part-time



Only applicants who complete the Typeform and share portfolio links will be considered.



We will shortlist candidates and invite them to a small PAID test (1–2 short videos) so both sides can see if it’s a fit before we start a trial month.

title: Content Manager
description:
Tri-Wellness is a holistic wellness brand founded by Lisa Shanken — an executive functioning coach, certified health counselor, personal trainer, and yoga instructor. Our mission is to help people live healthier, more harmonious lives through a whole-person approach that connects the gut, brain, body, and daily habits. We work especially closely with neurodivergent adults and those navigating mental health challenges, meeting every client with warmth, practicality, and zero judgment.



Our core services include:



Executive Functioning Coaching: One-on-one coaching focused on skills like time management, emotional regulation, organization, and impulse control)



Social Bloom: A structured group program that helps adults build meaningful friendships and social skills in a supportive, confidential setting



Love Bloom: Neurodivergent-friendly speed dating and connection events reimagined to feel safe, low-pressure, and genuinely fun.



Content plays a direct role in filling all of these programs — and you will play a central role in ensuring their success.



Your Role



We are seeking a part-time (20 hours per week, with potential to move to full-time) mid-level Content Manager who can translate Lisa's voice, philosophy, and expertise into compelling stories across every touchpoint. You'll be the keeper of the brand to ensure that everything we publish, whether a blog post, an Instagram caption, a website page, or a weekly newsletter, feels cohesive, human, and true to who Lisa is.



Your content will serve multiple strategic goals: attracting and converting the right people into coaching clients, Social Bloom group members, and Love Bloom event attendees; building Lisa's credibility and visibility within the professional and B2B community to generate referral partnerships with therapists, psychologists, psychiatrists, and other allied health professionals and communities; and supporting the recruitment of coaches to empower us to expand the Tri-Wellness model to other parts of the country.



Work Environment & Job Details



- You have your own computer and Internet connection (this is a home-based position)

- You must be willing to work at least 2 hours per day between 8am-6pm MST

- Part-Time Role: 20 hours per week, with potential to move to full-time

- We provide guaranteed 100% on-time salary payments



What You'll Do



Editorial & Storytelling



- Own and manage the editorial calendar across all content channels

- Write and edit blog posts and articles on topics spanning executive functioning, social skills, nutrition, fitness, gut health, mindfulness, and neurodiversity

- Collaborate closely with Lisa to capture her authentic voice and translate her expertise into accessible, engaging content

- Develop content series, campaigns, and storytelling frameworks that deepen audience connection and build trust with both the neurodivergent community and professional referral partners

- Provide brand/content aligned video scripts for Lisa to create videos that support the overall content marketing strategy; light video editing as necessary



Social Media & Brand Voice



- Manage and grow Tri-Wellness social media presence (Instagram,
, TikTok, LinkedIn, and others as relevant)

- Write platform-native content that reflects Lisa's warm, practical, and empowering tone

- Develop content that speaks to multiple audiences: individuals seeking executive functioning support, adults looking to build social connections through Social Bloom, neurodivergent adults open to dating and connection through Love Bloom, and professionals in the mental health and wellness space who may either refer clients and/or join the Tri-Wellness coaching team as it expands throughout the U.S.

- Use LinkedIn strategically to build Lisa's thought leadership presence among therapists, psychologists, social workers, special education professionals, and other allied health providers

- Create and execute social campaigns around group enrollment windows and event registration deadlines to drive sign-ups

- Repurpose long-form content into short-form social assets



Website Content



- Audit, refresh, and maintain website copy to ensure it accurately reflects the brand and converts visitors into clients, group members, and referral partners

- Write and update service pages, landing pages, and evergreen content in Lisa's voice

- Develop content that speaks to prospective coaches interested in joining or expanding the Tri-Wellness model in their region

- Partner with web developer to ensure content and presentation are aligned



 Marketing



- Create
 newsletter content

- Develop nurture sequences and campaign
s for Tri-Welness offerings, i.e. Executive Functioning Coaching, Social Bloom group enrollment, and Love Bloom events

- Develop nurture sequences and campaign
s targeted to various audience segments, e.g. gender (male/female); mental health challenges (ADHD, neurodivergence, anxiety), etc…

- Build and maintain a separate communication stream for professional and B2B audiences, including referral partners and prospective coaches

- Drive list growth through thoughtful opt-in strategies and consistent value delivery



Funnel Building & Conversion



- Own the content strategy across the full marketing funnel — from awareness to action — ensuring every piece of content has a clear role in moving the right person closer to working with Tri-Wellness

- Develop top-of-funnel content (blog, social, lead magnets) designed to drive traffic and grow the opt-in list with qualified, mission-aligned audiences

- Build and optimize mid-funnel nurture content that educates, builds trust, and speaks directly to the pain points and goals of each audience segment

- Drive bottom-of-funnel conversions specific to each service: booked discovery calls for Executive Functioning Coaching and Social Bloom group enrollment, and direct ticket sales for Love Bloom events

- Collaborate with Lisa to develop lead magnets, free resources, or gated content that attract the right people into the funnel





What We're Looking For



- 3–5 years of content creation, content marketing and editorial experience, ideally in wellness, mental health, and coaching

- Proficient in leveraging AI tools to work more efficiently — while consistently preserving Lisa's human voice and never letting AI flatten the warmth or specificity that defines the brand

- A strong writer with a warm, conversational style who can adapt across formats and audiences — from long-form editorial to professional thought leadership to conversion-driven

- Experience ghostwriting or writing in someone else's voice by translating brand voice into compelling content

- Demonstrated ability to create content that drives action (sign-ups, registrations, inquiries, referrals), not just engagement

- Genuine comfort with topics like mental health, neurodiversity, executive functioning, and holistic wellness

- Self-directed, organized, and able to manage multiple content streams and audiences independently



Nice To Have



- Personal or professional connection to the neurodivergent community

- Experience marketing to or communicating with healthcare or mental health professionals

- Basic graphic design skills for social assets (e.g., Canva)

- Light video editing for social media video content

- Background in health coaching, integrative nutrition, or a related field

- Experience growing a personal brand or thought leadership platform



Why This Role



This is a chance to do meaningful work that genuinely helps people. You'll have real creative ownership across every content channel, a close working relationship with Lisa, and the opportunity to shape a brand that has both heart and depth — one that's growing its reach, not just with individual clients, but within the broader professional wellness community nationwide.



If this describes you - and you possess the skills sets we are seeking - then we'd love to have you on board with us! You can apply thru this link:

title: Full Time Remote Customer Support Assistant
description:
We are building a distributed support team and are looking for a Customer Support Assistant who takes written communication seriously and values consistency in their work. This is a full-time remote position designed for someone who wants dependable income, clear expectations, and the chance to grow within a structured environment over time.



This role is not project-based or temporary. We are looking for someone who wants stability, is comfortable working set hours, and understands that strong support is built on reliability and attention to detail.



You will spend your workday handling customer conversations through written messages. Your responsibility is to provide clear, accurate, and professional responses while maintaining a friendly tone. You will work within defined guidelines, manage several conversations at the same time, and ensure users receive timely and helpful replies. Part of the role also involves flagging recurring issues, technical problems, or useful feedback so the team can improve processes and systems.

Full onboarding and training are provided before you begin working independently.



This role requires strong written English and a typing speed of at least 60 words per minute. You must have a reliable internet connection of 50-100 Mbps or higher. A dependable laptop or desktop computer with at least 8 GB of RAM is required.



You should be available full-time for a consistent schedule of eight hours per day, six days per week. We value people who are detail-oriented, professional in their communication, dependable in meeting expectations, and open to feedback and improvement.



Previous experience in customer support, chat-based roles, or remote work is helpful but not required.



The hourly pay for this position ranges from 4 to 6 USD, depending on experience and performance.

In addition to base pay, there are performance-based bonuses, regular reviews, and opportunities for raises. Team members who consistently perform well can grow into higher-responsibility and higher-paying roles over time.



Why Join Us?

You’ll be working remotely in a structured environment with clear systems, training, and expectations. This role is ideal for someone who wants long-term stability rather than short-term gigs, and who values growth through consistent performance.



Apply now by sending us a message with all relevant information mentioned above and we look forward to having you!

title: Data Operations Associate
description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW: 

With over 25 years in business, Premier Group Insurance is one of the largest and fastest growing Property & Casualty (P&C) insurance agencies in the United States. Insurance Journal ranks Premier in the Top 12 in Personal Lines out of an independent agency universe of nearly 40,000 agencies, and #38 in total P&C.  We are a team of dedicated professionals with a singular focus:  to be the best in the industry for our agency owners and the staff who support them.  We believe that a best-in-class insurance network should provide four key elements to insurance entrepreneurs:



Role and Responsibilities - Policy Download Matching & Enrollment

• Manage and reconcile policy downloads from insurance carriers, ensuring accurate matching to AMS client records. We use EZLynx as their primary Agency Management Systems (AMS)

• Investigate and resolve unmatched or incorrect policy data leveraging AMS and CRM tool. We use 
 as their primary CRM tool

• Collaborate with agents to troubleshoot download issues and provide operational support

• Enroll and onboard agencies for new carrier download connections, ensuring proper setup, maintenance and activation

• New insurance carrier setup

• Coordinate with Personal Lines, Commercial Lines, Commissions & Accounting, and Licensing departments to identify and resolve data discrepancies

• Track data discrepancies and recurring issues, reporting insights and recommending process improvements

• Update management on Data Trends & Analysis of mis-matches and reasons

• Book of Business data pull - download data from EZLynx into Excel format, create pivot tables and visualization for management



ABILITY TO:

• Work effectively in a collaborative team environment

• Learn multiple insurance carrier systems, reporting platforms

• Be comfortable communicating with insurance carriers and agent in resolving policy un-matches and carrier setup issues

• Think outside of the box and develop tools for Independent Agents

• Communicate clearly and effectively, both orally and in writing

• Be comfortable communicating with vendors (EZLynx, Carriers, etc.)

• Prepare and present clear and concise reports to variety of audiences

• Learn and become very comfortable with AMS (EZLynx) and CRM (
) tools

• Maintain confidentiality

• Plan and devise meetings and work plans

• Exercise sound decision making



MINIMUM JOB REQUIREMENTS

• Familiarity with EZLynx, 
 (preferred) or be willing to learn quickly and be self supportive

• Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, Word, and other Company tech stack softwares

• Excellent attention to detail and ability to follow structured processes

• Strong organizational and time management skills



Soft Skills:

• Strong communication and collaboration skills

• Ability to handle repetitive tasks with consistent accuracy

• Willingness to learn new systems and IT processes

• Problem solving mindset with a focus on continuous improvement



This will be part-time (4 hours/daily)+ position; potentially leading to full-time. Hours are flexible between 7:30 am - 3 pm Colorado Mountain Time zone

title: Virtual assistant and booking coordinator (bonuses on top of base)
description:
Evening/Night Virtual Assistant – Real Estate (EST)

Hours: Sunday–Friday 4PM–12 AM | Saturday 8 AM–4 PM



About the Role



We are hiring a fast, organized, and highly responsive Virtual Assistant to support a high-volume real estate operation.



This role is not slow-paced admin work. You will be managing bookings, responding to inquiries, coordinating showings, and answering calls in real time.



If you are someone who works quickly, stays organized under pressure, and can handle multiple conversations and tasks at once, you will do well here.



If you prefer slow, quiet work with minimal urgency, this role will not be a good fit.



Core Responsibilities



• Respond to incoming messages and inquiries quickly and professionally

• Book and coordinate property showings

• Maintain calendars and scheduling systems

• Answer all incoming calls during your shift and make outgoing calls when needed

• Handle data entry, leases, and administrative tasks

• Follow communication scripts when speaking with clients

• Schedule and post basic social media content

• Keep records accurate and organized



Important: Work Style



This role involves:



• High message volume

• Many simultaneous conversations

• Urgent booking requests

• Frequent feedback and corrections



You must be able to work quickly, stay calm, and adjust fast.



Requirements



• Previous experience as a Virtual Assistant or administrative assistant

• Strong English communication (written and verbal)

• Fast typing and strong attention to detail

• Comfortable with Google Calendar, Gmail, Google Docs, and Google Sheets

• Reliable internet and quiet workspace

• Must answer all calls during shift hours



Preferred Experience



• Booking systems or scheduling tools

• Real estate or property management support

• Social media scheduling 
, Instagram, TikTok)



Ideal Candidate



• Fast and responsive

• Organized and detail-oriented

• Comfortable receiving frequent feedback

• Reliable and consistent

• Able to handle multiple tasks at once



Work Schedule

Saturday: 8 AM – 4 PM EST



Compensation

Regular shifts: $4/hour



Performance Bonuses

The tea
mber who booked the showing that led to the closed deal receives:

Your typing speed (WPM)

The word “FAST” at the top of your application so we know you read this description

title: Creator Outreach - Setter
description:
Job post summary

Date posted: April 10, 2026

Pay: ?47,728.00 - ?71,592.00 per month

Work Location: Remote



Submit your Application here: 
/
/f/2kz0ma3h-1156/MHHLY4BOXCKVXG8CCW





Job description:



About the Role

This is a mid-level hybrid role sitting at the intersection of creator acquisition and operational excellence. You will be the engine that keeps a steady flow of qualified creators moving into our sales pipeline, and the safeguard that ensures nothing falls through the cracks once a deal is closed.



You will not be running sales calls — our partner handles those. What you will own is everything that happens before and after: sourcing and engaging creators across platforms, filling the partner's calendar with qualified prospects, and then taking full ownership of the contract, onboarding, and setup process from signature through to kickoff.



This role is well suited to someone who has spent two or more years in outreach, partnerships, operations, or a similar function and is ready to take on broader ownership across a full creator lifecycle. You bring structure, initiative, and a closer's mentality to everything you do.



What You Will Be Doing Lead Generation & Outreach



- Proactively source and qualify creators across
, Instagram, and other relevant platforms

- Identify and obtain personal contact information using a combination of manual research techniques and specialist tooling

- Execute outreach via direct messaging and
, with a strong focus on conversion

- Develop and bring your own lead generation ideas and angles alongside established playbooks — we want your thinking, not just your execution

- Build and maintain clean, accurate lead and pipeline records in Airtable with rigorous data hygiene

- Book qualified prospects directly into the partner's calendar for closing calls



Contract Management & Creator Onboarding

- Upon deal closure, assume full ownership of the post-sale process

- Issue contracts reflecting each creator's specific commercial terms — precision here is non-negotiable, as we are legally bound by what is documented

- Manage signature collection and all back-and-forth on amendment requests, including drafting redlines with AI assistance and routing documents through DocuSign

- Set up each signed creator in Google Chat and Notion in accordance with our standard operating procedures

- Schedule kickoff calls with our Head of Client Success to ensure a seamless handover



What We Are Looking ForExperience & Track Record

- 2+ years of experience in a role involving outreach, business development, partnerships, operations, or a closely related function

- Some exposure to cold outreach with measurable results — you do not need an extensive track record, but you should be able to speak to what worked and why

- Experience maintaining records in Airtable, a CRM, or a comparable project management tool

- Prior exposure to contracts or commercial documentation is advantageous but not required



Skills & Attributes

- Closer mentality. You own outcomes, not tasks. If a signed contract is the goal and a creator goes quiet, you follow up — at 48 hours, and again, and again — until it is done. You do not mark something complete until it actually is.

- Highly organised. You maintain clean systems, think in processes, and understand that good records are a business-critical function, not an administrative afterthought.

- Detail-oriented. Particularly around contracts, commercial terms, and data integrity. Errors in these areas have real consequences, and you treat them accordingly.

- Self-starter. You generate your own ideas for lead generation and process improvement rather than waiting to be directed. You see gaps and fill them.

- Clear, professional written English. You write concisely and persuasively — whether drafting a cold outreach message or following up on a contract signature.

- Confident AI user. You actively use tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini for problem-solving, drafting, and contract work. This is not optional — it is part of how we operate.



Practical Requirements

- Reliable equipment and a stable, high-speed internet connection — this is a hard requirement

- Availability across a broad working window; our creators and partners operate across multiple time zones, and flexibility is more important than fixed hours



Why This Role

This is a role with genuine ownership from day one. You will not be executing a narrow set of tasks — you will be responsible for two critical functions of the business and will have the latitude to improve the systems and processes you work within. For the right candidate, it is an opportunity to grow quickly, take on commercially significant responsibilities, and make a visible impact on creator growth.

title: Part Time Property Manager
description:
Remote Property Management Assistant (VA) – Strong Follow-Through Required



We’re hiring a highly organized and proactive Virtual Assistant to support day-to-day property management operations. This is not a passive role — we need someone who takes ownership, follows through on every task, and ensures nothing falls through the cracks.



Core Responsibilities:



Track and follow up on rent collection (daily check-ins, late payment reminders)

Manage maintenance tickets from request to completion (coordinate vendors, confirm work is done)

Handle tenant communication quickly and professionally

Coordinate move-ins and move-outs, including checklists and scheduling and booking cleaners 

Track security deposits and ensure proper return documentation

Maintain clean, accurate records (payments, leases, updates)



What We’re Looking For:



Strong follow-through — you don’t drop tasks, and you chase completion

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Fast response time and clear communication

Able to manage multiple properties and ongoing tasks without supervision

Prior experience in property management or operations is a plus



Important:

This role requires someone who closes loops, not just starts tasks. If you tend to forget follow-ups or need constant reminders, this is not the right fit.

title: Full-Time Video Editor & Social Media Manager (Motivational / Lifestyle Brand)

?

?

But the standard is high.



We are NOT looking for:

We ARE looking for:

?

?

?



Role Details

?



To Apply
