title: HR & Recruitment Coordinator
description:
I'm looking for a sharp, people-first HR & Recruitment Coordinator who is technically savvy, highly organized, and ready to own this role from day one. This is not a placeholder position — we're building something real and we need someone who wants to be part of it.



---



WHAT THIS ROLE OWNS



- Full recruitment cycle — sourcing, screening, interviewing, and placing top-tier candidates at a high level

- Team compliance tracking — making sure every placed tea
mber meets standards and stays accountable

- Onboarding experience — building and running a structured onboarding process that sets every new hire up to win from day one

- Offboarding & substitution — managing the process of transitioning tea
mbers out cleanly and sourcing qualified substitutes quickly when needed

- HR documentation — maintaining team records, contracts, and internal HR policies in Notion

- Leadership communication — keeping founders informed on pipeline status, team flags, and HR updates proactively

- Culture support — actively contributing to a high-performance internal environment where people feel seen and held to a standard



---



YOU'RE THE RIGHT PERSON IF YOU:



- Have solid corporate HR or recruitment experience — you understand process, compliance, and people at a high level

- Source and recruit exceptionally well — you know how to find the right person, not just any person

- Are highly proficient in Notion — you live in it, you build in it, you organize everything through it

- Have working experience with Claude or other AI tools — and you're genuinely curious about how AI can make your work sharper and faster

- Are technically savvy — you pick up new tools quickly and understand how systems connect inside a growing company

- Communicate proactively — you don't wait to be asked, you update before leadership has to follow up

- Can handle sensitive HR situations — offboarding, substitutions, performance conversations — with professionalism and discretion

- Are looking for a long-term home — not a stepping stone. You want to grow with a company that's building something.

- Actually care about people — not just the paperwork behind them



---



THIS IS NOT FOR YOU IF YOU:



- Need heavy direction to figure out what to do next

- Go quiet when things get complicated or move fast

- See HR as just an administrative function

- Are looking for a short-term role or treating this as a side commitment



TO APPLY



Send your resume + a 1-2self intro. We move fast — if you're the right person, you'll know quickly.

Experience working with e-commerce or dropshipping brands

Worked on fashion creatives

title: Online Academic Tutor (English, Math and/or Science)
description:
We are seeking a passionate and dedicated Online Academic Tutor to deliver high-quality virtual instruction to students from Kindergarten through to Year 12 across Australia. The ideal candidate will foster a love for learning, adapt to individual student needs, and deliver engaging lessons aligned with the Australian Curriculum.



This role offers flexibility, allowing tutors to specialize in one, two, or all three subject areas: English, Mathematics, and Science, depending on their expertise and experience.



Responsibilities:

1. Deliver engaging, age-appropriate online lessons in English, Mathematics, and/or Science to students from Kindergarten to Year 12.

2. Develop and implement tailored lesson plans based on the Australian Curriculum and individual student learning needs.

3. Reinforce key concepts based on subject expertise:

- English: literacy, grammar, reading comprehension, and writing skills

- Mathematics: numeracy, algebra, geometry, statistics, and problem-solving

- Science: biology, chemistry, physics, and general scientific inquiry

4. Use interactive teaching methods, digital tools, and learning resources to enhance student engagement.

5. Assess student performance and provide regular, constructive feedback.

6. Monitor and track student progress, attendance, and academic outcomes.

7. Maintain accurate records of lessons and student development.

8. Communicate regularly with parents or guardians regarding student progress.

9. Encourage critical thinking, creativity, and confidence in learning.

10. Participate in tea
etings, training sessions, and ongoing professional development.



Qualifications:

1. Bachelor’s degree in Education or a relevant field (English, Mathematics, Science, or related discipline); teaching qualification preferred.

2. Experience teaching or tutoring students at Kindergarten, Primary, or Secondary levels (online experience highly regarded).

3. Strong understanding of the Australian Curriculum in at least one subject area (English, Math, or Science); proficiency in multiple subjects is an advantage.

4. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

5. Proficiency in using online teaching platforms (e.g., Zoom, Google Classroom, Microsoft Teams, or similar tools).

6. Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional home workspace.

7. Patient, adaptable, and student-focused with a passion for helping learners succeed.

 (Matt vs Japan, general style reference)

title: eCommerce Catalog & Operations Virtual Assistant (Remote)
description:
We are seeking a highly detail-oriented Virtual Assistant (VA) to join our team and help Capital City Commerce scale its eCommerce operations.



This role is focused on executing and managing structured, repeatable tasks that keep our product catalog organized, optimized, and running efficiently across multiple marketplaces including Amazon, Walmart, eBay, TikTok Shop, and Shopify.



You will play a critical role in helping us scale by creating product bundles, managing listings across channels, and supporting inventory and fulfillment workflows.



We provide clear SOPs, Loom videos, and structured processes for all tasks. Success in this role comes down to attention to detail, consistency, and ability to follow systems accurately.



We expect this role to require approximately 20–30 hours per week with the potential for growth over time.



Responsibilities:

--Amazon Virtual Bundles

     --Create and manage product bundles using existing products

     --Continuously expand bundle combinations based on guidelines

--Cross-Channel Listing Management

     --Take existing product listings and replicate them across additional marketplaces (Amazon, Walmart, eBay, Shopify, TikTok)

     --Ensure consistency in titles, descriptions, images, and attributes

--Catalog Maintenance

     --Identify and fix listing issues such as missing information, incorrect data, or duplicates

     --Maintain a clean and organized product catalog

--Inventory & Fulfillment Support

     --Track inventory levels across marketplaces based on predefined thresholds and report weekly

     --Flag products that need replenishment based on defined thresholds

     --Set up FBA, FBT, and WFS shipments in each platform

     --Generate and organize shipping labels for fulfillment

--Process Execution

     --Follow documented SOPs and workflows precisely

     --Suggest improvements to processes when opportunities are identified



Requirements:

--Strong attention to detail (critical for success in this role)

--Ability to follow step-by-step processes consistently

--Organized and process-driven mindset

--Strong written English communication skills

--Ability to work independently and manage time effectively

--Comfortable using Google Sheets / Docs

--Experience with e-commerce seller portals such as Amazon Seller Central, Etsy Shop Manager, and others (preferred)

--Comfortable with Canva or basic image editing tools (preferred)



Nice to Have:

--Experience with e-commerce seller portals such as Amazon Seller Central, Etsy Shop Manager, and others

--Familiarity with Canva or basic image editing tools

--Experience working with product listings or catalog management





Application Process



We use a multi-step process to identify candidates who are detail-oriented and a strong fit for our team:



1. Review our company and product listings:













2. Submit a Loom video (max 3 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining:

     --Why you are a good fit for this role

     --Your experience with detailed or repetitive tasks

     --How you stay organized and accurate in your work



3. Selected candidates will complete a short paid task related to product bundling



Please include the word “bundle” in the first sentence of your application so we know you read this.

title: Administrative Virtual Assistant – E-commerce Company (Canada)
description:
About Us: 

We are a growing e-commerce and brand distribution company based in Canada. We are expanding our operations and looking for a reliable and organized Administrative Virtual Assistant to join our small, remote team.



Position Overview:

This is a part-time administrative support role. You will work directly with the business owner to handle a wide variety of administrative, operational, and personal tasks, freeing up the owner to focus on business growth.



Responsibilities:



Bookkeeping and Invoices:

Assist with invoice tracking, basic bookkeeping tasks, and expense reconciliation.

Maintain accurate financial records and flag any discrepancies.



 and Communications:

Manage and triage business
 inboxes, flagging urgent items and drafting routine responses.

What is one thing you enjoy doing outside of work?

Reporting and Data Entry:

Maintain weekly and monthly reports on business operations.

Update spreadsheets and internal trackers with accurate data.

Upload documents to cloud storage as needed.



Back-End Operations Support:

Manage open cases and tickets with online marketplaces, follow up and escalate when needed.

Monitor inventory health and coordinate inbound shipments.

Track and action shipment discrepancies and missing or damaged items. When submitting your application, please use the following subject line: VA Application - [Your Name] - [Your Favourite Food]. Applications that do not follow this format will not be considered.



Marketplace Listings:

Post items to various online marketplaces as directed.

Maintain listing accuracy, update pricing, and respond to buyer inquiries.



Trip and Calendar Planning:

title: Social Media Marketing & Viral Script Expert
description:
Here's the complete, final job post with everything included:



---



**Job Title:** Social Media Manager – Instagram Growth Specialist (Cleaning Industry)



**Job Type:** Full-Time | Remote | Long-Term Opportunity



---



**About Us**



Greater Phoenix Cleaning is a premium residential, commercial, Airbnb turnover, and post-construction cleaning company serving the Greater Phoenix, Arizona area. We are on a mission to become the most recognized and trusted cleaning brand in Phoenix — and we need a social media powerhouse to help us get there.



We don't just clean homes. We give busy professionals and upper-middle-class families their time back. That's our brand. That's our promise.



---



**The Role**



We are looking for a Social Media Manager who is genuinely **obsessed** with Instagram and social media growth. This is not a part-time hobby — this is a full-time commitment to building a dominant online presence for our brand in the Greater Phoenix market.



You will be responsible for **6 high-quality posts per day, 7 days per week** across our Instagram account. Every single post must deliver real value, reflect current algorithm trends, and speak directly to our ideal customer and our ideal tea
mber.



---



**What You'll Be Posting About**



Content should rotate across the following pillars:



- Cleaning tips, techniques, and best practices for residential homes

- Commercial cleaning insights and standards

- Airbnb and short-term rental turnover strategies

- Post-construction cleanup processes and safety

- Health awareness — allergens, dust, mold, VOCs, and air quality

- Product education — what works, what's safe, what's most effective

- Industry trends and innovations in the cleaning world

- Recruitment content targeting experienced, professional cleaners in the Phoenix area who want to earn serious income

- Trust-building and authority content positioning Greater Phoenix Cleaning as the **#1 go-to cleaning company** in the area



---



**Your Primary Goals**



1. **Attract the Ideal Customer** — Upper-middle-class homeowners, busy professionals, real estate investors, and Airbnb hosts in the Greater Phoenix area who value their time and want premium, reliable cleaning services

2. **Attract A-Player Cleaning Professionals** — Experienced cleaners in the Phoenix area looking for a company that will pay well and treat them right

3. **Build Omnipresence** — We want Greater Phoenix Cleaning to be *everywhere* in the Phoenix market online



---



**What We're Looking For**



- Proven experience growing Instagram accounts — **you must provide examples of previous clients you have helped grow or go viral**

- Deep understanding of the Instagram algorithm and how it evolves — you study this constantly

- Ability to create or direct the creation of high-quality, visually compelling content (Reels, carousels, static posts, Stories)

- Strong English copywriting skills — captions must be engaging, clear, and on-brand

- Ability to research and translate cleaning industry topics into educational, shareable content

- Self-motivated and consistent — 6 posts per day, 7 days per week, no exceptions

- Experience with content scheduling tools (Later, Buffer, Meta Business Suite, etc.)

- Understanding of hashtag strategy, SEO for Instagram, and engagement tactics



---



**Nice to Have**



- Experience with video editing (CapCut, Premiere, or similar)

- Experience growing local service business accounts

- Familiarity with Canva or Adobe tools for graphics

- Experience with short-form video (Reels)



---



**What We Offer**



- Competitive base pay (based on experience and proven results)

- **Performance incentive pay** — bonuses for new clients and new cleaning tea
mbers that join as a direct result of social media efforts

- Long-term role for the right candidate — we want someone who grows with us

- The chance to build something real and become the social media architect behind one of Phoenix's top cleaning brands



---



**How to Apply**



Please submit the following:



1. A short introduction about yourself and your social media background

2. **Links to 2–3 Instagram accounts you have managed** — show us growth, viral content, or engagement results

3. Your proposed content strategy or content pillars for a cleaning company Instagram page

4. Your availability and rate expectation

5. **A 2–3 minute personalized Loom video addressed directly to Ross** — introduce yourself, tell us why you're the absolute best fit for **Greater Phoenix Cleaning**, and show us your personality. Generic videos will be disqualified. Make it count.



**Applications without a portfolio AND a Loom video will not be considered.**



---



We're building something big in Phoenix. If you're the kind of person who wakes up thinking about content, studies the algorithm for fun, and has a track record of making brands impossible to ignore — we want to talk.

title: Cold Call Manager / QA-QC & Lead Qualification Manager (Real Estate) – Full-Time
description:
Cold Call Manager / QA-QC & Lead Qualification Manager (Real Estate) – Full-Time



Job Type

Full-Time (Remote / Virtual)

Industry: Real Estate Acquisitions / Lead Generation



Position Overview



We are hiring a full-time Cold Call Manager to oversee our real estate cold-calling operation, manage caller performance, handle QA/QC, and improve lead qualification quality before leads are passed to acquisitions.



This role requires someone who is strong at listening to calls, understanding tone, coaching callers, and identifying where deals are being missed — especially on calls marked as “unqualified” that may actually deserve follow-up.



The ideal candidate has hands-on experience with ReadyModeIQ (ReadyMode), understands dialer management, and knows how to improve both team output and lead quality in a real estate environment.



Core Responsibilities



1) Cold Caller Team Management (Daily)

-Manage and supervise cold callers (full-time / part-time / VA team)

-Track daily performance metrics (dials, connects, conversations, outcomes, appointments)

-Ensure callers followscript, workflow, and disposition standards

-Run daily check-ins, feedback sessions, and performance huddles

-Monitor attendance, consistency, and productivity

-Assign call lists and priorities based on campaign goals

-Payroll



2) QA/QC (Quality Assurance / Quality Control)

-Review and score call recordings for:

-Script adherence

-Professionalism

-Clarity

-Confidence

-Tone and communication style

-Objection handling

-Accuracy of dispositions / call outcomes

-Provide coaching feedback to improve conversion and caller effectiveness

-Identify weak patterns (rushing, poor tone, bad transitions, missed qualifying questions, etc.)

-Maintain and improve QA scorecards and call standards

-Audit CRM notes/tags for accuracy and completeness



3) Unqualified Lead Call Review (Critical)

-Listen to calls marked as “unqualified” to verify whether they were truly unqualified

-Catch missed opportunities caused by:

-Poor caller tone

-Weak follow-up questions

-Incorrect dispositioning

-Failure to build rapport

-Missed seller motivation signals

-Reclassify leads when needed (nurture / warm / follow-up / manager review)

-Coach callers on how to better handle similar situations going forward

-Build a feedback loop to reduce false disqualifications and improve lead quality



4) Lead Qualification & Handoff Control

-Review and qualify leads before they are sent to acquisitions

-Confirm key data points such as:

-Property address

-Seller / decision-maker contact info

-Motivation

-Timeline

-Property condition (if available)

-Price expectation / asking range (if available)

-Occupancy / vacancy

-Best callback time / next step

-Organize leads by status (hot / warm / nurture / disqualified)

-Make manager-level follow-up qualification calls when needed

-Ensure acquisitions receives clean, accurate, actionable lead handoffs



5) ReadyModeIQ / Dialer Management

-Manage and monitor ReadyModeIQ / ReadyMode dialer operations

-Ensure campaigns, caller sessions, and workflows are running correctly

-Troubleshoot dialer-related issues (call flow, agent statuses, campaign setup, etc.)

-Help maintain dialing efficiency while preserving call quality

-Support list loading / campaign organization (as needed)

-Coordinate with leadership on dialing strategy, productivity, and performance optimization



6) Training, Coaching & Process Improvement

-Train new callers on script, tone, qualification, dispositions, and CRM process

-Run roleplays focused on rapport, objection handling, and confidence

-Coach callers on how they sound, not just what they say

-Improve call scripts and qualification flow based on call review trends

-Maintain SOPs for call handling, QA, and lead handoff standards



Required Qualifications



-Proven experience managing cold callers / appointment setters / inside sales teams

-Experience in real estate lead generation (investor, wholesale, acquisitions, brokerage, etc.)

-Strong experience with QA/QC call review and coaching

-Strong ability to evaluate tone, communication style, and seller interaction quality

-Experience reviewing calls marked “unqualified” and identifying missed opportunities

-Hands-on experience with ReadyModeIQ / ReadyMode

-Experience managing a dialer and monitoring caller performance

-Strong understanding of lead qualification and seller motivation

-Strong organization, follow-through, and accountability management

-Experience with CRM systems and accurate lead dispositioning



Preferred Qualifications (Strong Plus)



-Experience in real estate investing (wholesale, fix & flip, novation, seller finance, etc.)

-Experience managing remote teams / overseas callers / VAs

-Experience building QA scorecards and coaching systems

-Familiarity with list stacking, skip tracing, and campaign segmentation

-Ability to pull insights from call recordings and improve scripts/process quickly



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)



-Team call consistency and productivity

-Call quality scores (QA/QC)

-Tone/communication improvement across callers

-Lead qualification accuracy

-Reduction in false “unqualified” dispositions

-Number of qualified leads passed to acquisitions

-CRM note/tag accuracy

-Caller coaching progress and performance improvement

-Dialer uptime / campaign efficiency (ReadyModeIQ)



What Success Looks Like in This Role



-Callers sound professional, confident, and consistent

-Fewer good leads are lost due to poor tone or bad qualification

-“Unqualified” leads are properly audited and corrected when needed

-Acquisitions receives stronger, cleaner lead handoffs

-QA/QC and dialer management are organized, consistent, and scalable



Schedule / Availability



-Full-time remote role

-Must be available during core calling hours for target markets

-Daily communication with leadership and acquisitions team required

-Fast response time for caller issues, dialer problems, and lead review needs



Compensation (Example Language)



Compensation based on experience and results. Can include:

-Base salary or hourly (full-time)

-Performance incentives tied to:

-Team qualified leads

-QA performance

-Lead quality improvement

-Reduction in bad / missed lead dispositions

title: Tiktok video editor
description:
We’re looking for a creative and fast-moving TikTok Video Editor to join our team on a part-time basis. If you live and breathe short-form content and know how to turn raw clips into scroll-stopping videos, we’d love to hear from you.



What you’ll do:

Edit engaging TikTok-style videos (hooks, captions, transitions, sound effects)

Turn raw footage into high-performing short-form content

Add text overlays, trending audio, and effects to boost engagement

Repurpose content for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts

Stay updated on TikTok trends and bring fresh ideas to the table



What we’re looking for:

Strong understanding of TikTok-style editing (fast cuts, storytelling, hooks)

Experience with tools like CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar

Good sense of pacing, music, and visual storytelling

Able to work independently and deliver consistently

Bonus if you understand e-commerce / product-based content



Details:

Part-time: ~3 hours per day, 5 days a week

Remote work

title: AI Ad Creative Editor
description:
AI Ad Creative Editor — Remote (Full-Time)



MySweetSmile is an eight-figure DTC oral care brand trusted by over one million customers across the UK, US, and EU. We're hiring an AI Creative Editor to join our creative team and produce high-volume, high-quality ad creatives, product visuals, and video content across all channels.



This is a hands-on production role. You'll receive briefs from the Creative Team, and your job is to execute fast, use AI intelligently, and deliver polished, conversion-ready assets every single day.



You will be working directly within our proprietary AI Creative System alongside industry tools. If you're not already deep in the AI creative space, this role isn't for you.



---



What You'll Be Doing



Paid Social Ad Production

Edit and produce static and video ad creatives for Meta, TikTok, Google, and Amazon Ads. Execute UGC-style edits, product demos, overlays, animations, and performance-driven storytelling from supplied briefs. You will be expected to produce multiple finished ads per day.



AI-Driven Creative Production

Use our internal AI Creative System and external tools (Claude, Sora, Veo3, Nano Banana Pro, Kling, Midjourney, Runway) to generate, enhance, and iterate on creative assets at speed. You need to be an exceptional prompter who understands how to guide AI outputs to match a specific brief.



Graphic Design

Design static images, product renders, and visual assets for paid ads,
 marketing, Shopify image galleries, Amazon A+ Content, Amazon Brand Story, and Storefront. Clean, conversion-focused design with strong attention to visual hierarchy.



Video Editing (Short + Long Form)

Edit short-form paid social ads and longer-form content such as YouTube how-to guides, product walkthroughs, and educational videos.



Organisation & Workflow

Work within Notion (task management and briefs), Google Drive (asset storage and file management), and Slack (internal comms). You'll be expected to keep your work organised, name files correctly, update tickets, and manage your own pipeline without being chased.



---



Requirements



• Strong command of written English — you'll need to understand nuanced feedback, follow detailed briefs, and write clean on-screen text and captions.

• Proven experience producing high-performing ad creatives for eCommerce or DTC brands.

• Deep, practical experience with AI creative tools — not just awareness, but daily usage. You should be comfortable with Claude, Sora, Veo3, Nano Banana Pro, Kling, Midjourney, Runway, Photoshop AI, and similar.

• Strong proficiency in Photoshop, Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, and/or Final Cut.

• Experience producing Amazon A+ Content, image galleries, and eCommerce product visuals.

• Understanding of what makes a creative convert — you think about performance, not just aesthetics.

• Highly organised with experience using project management tools (Notion preferred).

• Ability to manage multiple deliverables with speed, accuracy, and minimal oversight.



---



Who This Is Not For



• People looking for a relaxed role. This is high output, every day.

• Creatives who prioritise aesthetics over performance.

• Anyone not already using AI tools daily in their creative workflow.

• People who need to be guided step-by-step instead of learning fast and taking ownership.

• Slow executors or anyone who can't handle direct feedback and fast turnarounds.



---



What You'll Gain



• Direct collaboration with the Managing Director and core creative team.

• Access to a proprietary, industry-leading AI Creative System built specifically for our brand.

• Clear briefs, clear expectations, and the opportunity to grow as our creative team scales.



---



How to Apply



Subject line: "MSS AI Creative Editor — Application"



Include all of the following or your application will not be reviewed:



1. A short written introduction covering your experience with AI-driven creative production, eCommerce ad creative, and why you're a fit for this role.



2. A portfolio showing:

   • Meta/TikTok ad creatives (static + video)

   • AI-enhanced or AI-generated work

   • Amazon A+ Content / image galleries / product visuals

   • UGC edits or paid social performance videos



3. Evidence of AI proficiency — show us real examples of work created using AI tools.



4. A brief summary of your editing, design, and AI toolset.



Applications missing any of the above will not be considered.

title: Full-Time Creative Short-Form Video Creator (Script, Shoot, Edit)
description:
Title: Full-Time Creative Short-Form Video Creator (Script, Shoot, Edit)



About Us

We’re Atmee AI, a real-time AI avatar platform that helps creators and brands deploy lifelike, conversational AI versions of themselves for customer engagement, support, and content.  We focus on live, interactive AI avatars (not static generated videos), and we’re looking for a creator who understands this new style of content and can make it fun, surprising, and scroll-stopping. 



Role Overview

We’re hiring a full-time video creator who can independently:

* Come up with creative, attention-grabbing ideas

* Script short TikTok / Reels / Shorts-style videos

* Shoot/record the content (with yourself, friends, props, or environments)

* Edit and publish-ready videos in vertical or horizontal format



You’ll be responsible for making 3–5 short videos per day, Monday–Friday, that feel as playful and creative as the top 
 Instagram accounts (fun hooks, unexpected locations, stunts/pranks, interactive text, etc.), but for our AI avatar product.



What You’ll Be Creating

You’ll create short-form videos that:

* Feel native to TikTok/IG/YouTube Shorts (lo-fi, fast-paced, fun, not corporate) 

* Show how creators, SaaS founders, or small businesses could use real-time AI avatars in surprising or funny ways

* Use hooks, text on screen, and visual gags to stop the scroll and make people want to share. 

* Highlight clear benefits like 24/7 presence, live conversations, and customer support, with simple, clear messaging. 



Your Day-to-Day

* Brainstorm 3–5 video ideas per day that can catch attention in the first 1–2 seconds. 

* Write quick scripts or bullet-point storyboards (hook, build-up, punchline/CTA). 

* Shoot footage yourself (on your phone/camera) or with available people/locations. 

* Edit videos in CapCut / Premiere or similar with captions, music, and on-screen text. 

* Deliver final videos to us daily (3–5 videos) and iterate quickly based on feedback. 



Hard Skills (Must Have)

Please only apply if you:

* Have a strong short-form video portfolio (TikTok / Reels / Shorts) where you did concept + script + filming + editing. 

* Are comfortable scripting and planning hooks, CTAs, and story flow, not just cutting clips. 

* Can film in vertical format with clear audio and stable framing. 

* Can edit fast and clean in tools like CapCut, Premiere, or similar. 

* Can produce 3–5 videos per day consistently when working full-time on this. 



Big plus if you:

* Have worked with SaaS or software tools before (explainers, testimonials, or UGC for apps). 

* Have any AI-related UGC (AI tools, AI avatars, AI content platforms, etc.). 

* Understand basic funnels (getting attention, driving clicks, simple CTAs). 



Soft Skills (How You Work)

* You’re proactive with ideas and not waiting for us to tell you every concept. 

* You communicate clearly in written and spoken English. 

* You’re reliable with deadlines and open to feedback and rapid iteration. 

* You’re comfortable working async with a small startup team. 



Trial Project & Pay

* Apply following the instructions below. If selected, we’ll start with a paid trial before hiring full-time. 



Trial project:

* Create 3 short vertical videos (15–45 seconds each) based on your own concepts after reviewing our website and product.

* Pay: $50 total for 3 videos



If the trial goes well, we’ll discuss a full-time monthly rate for ongoing work (expected 3–5 videos per day). 



How to Apply (Please Follow Exactly)

Include:

* Portfolio links (non-negotiable):

* 5–10 links to your best TikTok / Reels / Shorts where you did script + shoot + edit. 

* At least 2 examples where you used creative hooks, stunts, or playful ideas.



Short answers (1–3 sentences each): 

* What’s your experience creating short-form content where you own an idea ? script ? shoot ? edit?

* Have you created content for SaaS or AI tools before? If yes, which ones?

* Realistically, how many videos can you finish per day if this is your full-time focus?



Rate confirmation:

* Confirm you’re happy with the paid 3-video trial rate and share your expected monthly rate for full-time work (3–5 videos per day).

title: Sales Admin & AI Operations Support
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW



Fintonia Group is seeking a Senior Sales Admin & AI Operations Support professional to serve as the operational backbone of its sales and client engagement functions. This is not a conventional administrative role: the individual will be responsible for maintaining rigorous sales operations while independently building and managing AI-powered workflows that enhance team productivity, client responsiveness, and process quality. A non-negotiable attribute for this role is an exceptional standard of accuracy — the work product this person owns directly reflects on the firm's credibility with clients and counterparties.



The successful candidate will bring a combination of structured administrative discipline and a strong command of modern AI automation tools. Reporting directly to the Head of Sales, this person will work across sales, compliance, and operations to ensure that client onboarding and engagement workflows operate to institutional standards.



At a firm that sits at the intersection of traditional finance and digital assets, the ability to translate operational complexity into streamlined, technology-enabled processes will be a direct contribution to commercial outcomes.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. AI Workflow Design & Maintenance

- Own the design, build, and ongoing maintenance of AI-assisted workflows across sales operations, client communications, and document management.

- Identify manual or repetitive processes and deploy automation solutions using tools such as n8n, Zapier, Make, or similar platforms integrated with LLMs.

- Maintain and iterate on prompt libraries, automated response flows, and AI-assisted drafting tools used by the sales team.

- Monitor AI workflow performance, troubleshoot failures, and implement improvements in response to operational feedback.



2. Sales Operations Support

- Manage CRM hygiene and data integrity, ensuring pipeline records, contact logs, and activity tracking remain current and accurate.

- Prepare regular sales reports and performance summaries for the Head of Sales, translating pipeline and activity data into clear, actionable insights.

- Support internal reporting requirements by compiling and structuring data from CRM and other operational systems.



3. Client Onboarding & Coordination

- Manage the preparation and tracking of client onboarding documentation, coordinating with compliance and operations to ensure timely completion.

- Act as a reliable point of contact for client queries, ensuring responses are substantive, accurate, and delivered within agreed timeframes.

- Organize and support client meetings, webinars, and product demonstrations, including logistics, materials, and follow-up coordination.



4. Process Improvement

- Proactively identify bottlenecks in sales and client service workflows and develop structured proposals for improvement.

- Document operational procedures and build internal knowledge bases that reduce dependency on tribal knowledge.



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE):

- 4+ years of experience in sales support, client operations, or administrative roles within financial services or a related regulated environment.

- Demonstrated hands-on experience building and maintaining AI-assisted workflows using tools such as n8n, Make, Zapier, or equivalent automation platforms.

- Working knowledge of LLM prompt design and practical application of AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) in a professional operations context.

- Proficiency in CRM systems (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot) with demonstrated experience maintaining data quality.

- Strong written and verbal communication skills in English; capable of producing client-grade documentation independently.

- Experience with client onboarding documentation or compliance-adjacent processes.

- Exceptional attention to detail — this role involves managing documentation, data, and client records where errors have direct business and reputational consequences. Candidates must demonstrate a track record of precision under workload pressure.

- Ability to work independently in a remote environment, exercise sound judgment, and escalate appropriately.



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS (NICE-TO-HAVE):

- Experience building internal tools or documentation systems (e.g., Notion, Confluence, Airtable).

- Background working in or with cross-functional teams spanning compliance, product, and sales.

- Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Finance, Information Systems, or a related discipline.



SUCCESS METRICS (FIRST 6–12 MONTHS):

- At least 3 recurring manual workflows have been replaced or materially accelerated through AI automation, with measurable time savings documented.

- Sales reports are delivered consistently on schedule, with the Head of Sales confirming they are actionable and replacing previously manual consolidation efforts.

- Client onboarding turnaround time meets or improves on established benchmarks, with zero compliance escalations attributed to documentation errors.

- CRM data integrity score (completeness and accuracy) meets the internal standard set by the sales lead.

- Sales team reports a meaningful reduction in administrative overhead, allowing more time to be allocated to client-facing activities.



ABOUT FINTONIA GROUP:

Fintonia Group is a technology-enabled digital assets financial services platform with offices in Singapore and Kuala Lumpur. The firm combines deep institutional finance expertise with a focused mandate to bring credible, regulated financial services infrastructure to the digital assets space.



The team is composed of professionals with backgrounds at leading global investment banks and financial institutions. Fintonia operates in a dynamic, high-accountability environment where individual contributions have direct business impact and where the expectation is ownership, not execution of instructions.



Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Work Hours: Aligned with Singapore Time Zone (SGT), Monday to Friday



Please apply through this link - 
 . 

ONLY applicants who upload CV via the link will be considered. Thanks!

title: Growth and Sales Manager
description:
About You 

You want to be part of something with massive potential, there from the ground floor. 

You thrive in environments where the expectations are high, the goal is challenging, the mission is clear, and the team supports each other to get better every day. 

You’re looking for a role with real responsibility, where you feel ownership over what you build. 

You are excited by working directly with a successful entrepreneur who invests in you. 

You want to build something that supports others through stable, dignified, growth-oriented jobs. 

You are a natural closer with a strategist’s mind — equally energized by understanding what makes people say “yes” and building the repeatable systems that turn those yeses into scale. 



Role Overview 

The Growth & Sales Manager is the engine behind Moonlight’s client acquisition strategy. As the Growth & Sales Manager you have a deep instinct for what drives people to say “yes” and the systems-thinking discipline to scale that into a repeatable process. You have a creative and entrepreneurial mind. You are adept at all lead gen tactics — whether it’s cold
, partnerships, webinars, LinkedIn plays, or unconventional outreach strategies. You will work closely with our Digital Marketer to bridge brand and performance — ensuring that outbound efforts are aligned with the broader marketing strategy and that Moonlight is continually being introduced to new audiences in compelling ways. 

Equal parts closer and strategist, this role is responsible for building, refining, and executing our entire outbound and inbound sales funnel — from lead generation through to conversion, onboarding, and renewal. This person is relentlessly outcome-driven, deeply persuasive, and thrives in a fast-paced, early-stage environment where growth is the mandate.



Qualifications 

? 5-7+ years of experience in a sales, growth, or business development role, ideally in a fast-paced startup or service-based business 

? Proven track record of exceeding sales targets and closing high-value clients through outbound channels 

? Deep understanding of sales psychology, lead qualification, and consultative selling 

? Experience designing or optimizing a high-converting sales funnel — from cold outreach to contract 

? Strong proficiency with CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Pipedrive) and sales automation tools ? Excellent verbal and written communication skills — persuasive, clear, and human 

? Highly analytical and data-driven with the ability to identify drop-off points and improve conversion rates 

 Creative thinker who enjoys testing and iterating on outreach strategies, messaging, and formats

? Comfortable collaborating with marketers, operators, and leadership to align growth across functions 

? Thrives in a lean, early-stage environment with high autonomy and a bias toward action 

? Excellent project management and organizational abilities; adept at balancing multiple priorities under tight timelines. 

? Comfort and skill in working remotely with distributed, multicultural teams 

Compensation, Growth, and Benefits 

? Competitive compensation commensurate with experience 

? Opportunity for performance-based bonuses as the company grows 

? Direct mentorship from the founder and CEO 

? 21 days of paid time off 

? Health benefits (in progress) 

? Philippines 13th month end of year bonus

description:

title: Operations Support (Content Review & Customser Service)
description:
ABOUT US:

We are a US company that help creators monetize digital fan interactions at scale.

Our platform automates conversations, content delivery, and revenue generation, allowing creators to earn more while reducing manual effort.



We are a small, fast-moving team focused on execution over process.

We are hiring Operations staff to support content review, spot checks and reviews of user interactions, and customer support workflows.



You will work with user messages and platform content, helping ensure clarity, consistency, and quality across the system. This includes reviewing conversations and making judgment calls based on context.



This role involves working with adult-oriented content. You must be comfortable handling sensitive material in a professional and objective way.



You will work independently most of the time. Clear thinking, attention to detail, and strong writing are essential.



ROLE REQUIREMENTS: 



- Excellent written English (grammar, tone, clarity)

- Strong attention to detail

- Ability to understand context and underlying meaning

- Comfortable working with adult-oriented content

HOURS & PAY:

WHY JOIN:

- Small, focused team with fast decision-making

APPLICATION:

title: Amazon Client Acquisition Specialist (PL & PPC Lead Gen)
description:
We are a growing Amazon agency looking for a proactive and results-driven Amazon Client Acquisition Specialist from the Philippines to join our team. Your primary role will be to identify, contact, and secure new clients—specifically Amazon Private Label sellers and brands who need expert management for their Amazon PPC and overall account growth.



This is a unique role that blends lead generation, sales, and a strong understanding of the Amazon ecosystem. You will be the first point of contact for potential clients, helping us expand our portfolio and provide valuable services to sellers looking to scale.



Responsibilities:

Lead Generation & Prospecting: Identify potential clients (Amazon Private Label sellers) through platforms like LinkedIn, online communities, Amazon seller forums, and by analyzing Amazon listings. Build and maintain a strong pipeline of qualified leads.

Outbound Sales & Outreach: Initiate contact with decision-makers via personalized
, LinkedIn, and other channels. Articulate the value of our Amazon PPC management and account growth services.

Client Communication & Qualification: Engage with prospects to understand their current challenges, goals, and service needs. Qualify leads to ensure they are a good fit for our services.

Relationship Building: Nurture relationships with potential clients, positioning our company as a trusted partner for their Amazon growth.

Market Research: Stay updated on Amazon selling trends, PPC strategies, and the competitive landscape to better understand client pain points and tailor outreach.

Collaboration: Work closely with our PPC and account management teams to ensure a smooth handoff of new clients and provide feedback from the market.

Reporting: Track outreach activities, lead status, and conversion metrics to provide regular updates on client acquisition progress.



Required Skills & Qualifications:



Proven experience in sales, business development, or lead generation, specifically for Amazon services (e.g., PPC management, account management, listing optimization).

Strong understanding of Amazon Private Label (PL) and FBA business models. You should know what a PL seller's world looks like and speak their language.

Familiarity with Amazon PPC (campaign types, key metrics like ACOS/ROAS) is a major advantage, as it will enable you to confidently discuss our services with potential clients.



Excellent written and verbal English communication skills with a neutral accent.

Proficiency with sales and research tools like LinkedIn Sales Navigator,
 automation tools, and CRM software.

Self-motivated, organized, and results-oriented. You are comfortable working independently and managing your own pipeline.

Reliable high-speed internet connection and a dedicated workspace for remote work.



Nice-to-Have Skills:



Existing network or experience within Amazon seller communities.

title: Webflow Developer + Animation Specialist (Spline / Rive / Three.js)
description:
We're completing our Webflow website and need a skilled developer who can both build pages and create high-quality   interactive animations that visualise how our AI agent and signal detection systems work.



Location & Availability

  - Must be based in the Philippines (non-negotiable)

  - Must be available to start immediately



The Role

This is a hands-on Webflow build and animation contract. The site structure exists but is incomplete — there are 16   missing pages, broken navigation, an empty footer, homepage bugs, and static images where there should be live   animations. Your job is to complete it.



This is not a template job. We need someone who can work natively inside an existing Webflow project, match our design  system, and build animations that are hardcoded and page-performance friendly — no video embeds on landing pages.

  ---

What You'll Be Building

1. Fix existing homepage issues

- Ticker bar has placeholder text — needs real content or removal

- Scroll-triggered pipeline section creates a ~3000px blank space at the top — sticky positioning needs to be fixed

- Footer is completely empty — needs a full build (links, logo, legal)

- All mega-menu nav links currently point to # — need to be wired to real pages

2. Build 16 missing pages (using 3–4 reusable templates)

3. Create AI Agent animations (hero & feature sections)

   Reference style: dark terminal UI / dashboard aesthetic with real-time data streams.

4. Full responsive QA

The current build may not be optimised for mobile/tablet. All pages and animations need to work across devices.

5. Custom branded 404 page

  

Must-Have Skills

- Webflow mastery — you work natively in the Webflow Designer, not just export code. CMS experience required (blog is  live; Playbooks and industry pages may need CMS structure)

- Animation experience — Spline 3D, Rive, or Three.js (at least one; ideally Spline or Rive for Webflow integration).



We need premium, interactive motion design — not CSS transitions

- B2B / SaaS marketing site experience — you understand how these sites are structured and what converts

- Ability to work within an existing project — not rebuild from scratch; match our design system and conventions



  Bonus Skills

  - GSAP

  - Webflow Interactions 2.0

  - Scroll-driven animation experience



What to Submit With Your Application

  1. A link to at least one Webflow site you've built in the last 12 months

  2. A link to at least one Spline, Rive, or Three.js animation you've built in the last 12 months

  3. A brief note on your availability and hourly rate



 your CV and examples to: 



Portfolios without animation examples will not be considered.



Trial Task

Shortlisted candidates will be offered a paid trial task (~8 hours) to build a service page template before any longer engagement is confirmed.



 your CV and examples to:

title: SEO, Content Creation and Ads Specialist
description:
Job Title: SEO, Content Creation and Ads Specialist

Employment Type: Full-Time

Location: Remote

Salary: Up to PHP 25,000–35,000/month + commission (depending on qualifications and interview outcomes)

About the Role

Vertex Group is an Australian NDIS-focused business portfolio operating various brands across provider management software, compliance consulting, participant support, and plan management. We are looking for an SEO Specialist with strong content writing skills to grow our organic presence across traditional search engines and AI-driven platforms.

This role goes beyond standard SEO execution. You will own keyword strategy, produce high-quality content, manage technical SEO, and build our visibility in AI-generated search results — including platforms like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. You will work across multiple brands within the NDIS sector, so understanding this space is a clear advantage.



? What You Will Do

SEO & Content Strategy

• Develop and execute SEO strategies that produce measurable organic growth across the Vertex Group brand portfolio.

• Create high-quality, NLP-friendly content aligned with target audience search intent and business goals.

• Build and maintain content frameworks, SOPs, and reusable execution templates.

• Optimise content for AI-generated search results through Answer Optimisation (AO) and Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO) techniques.

• Map content to funnel stages, from awareness through to conversion.

Keyword Research & Search Intent

• Own keyword research and identify high-impact opportunities across all brands.

• Map search intent across traditional and AI-driven search journeys.

• Align keyword targeting with audience segments, including NDIS providers, participants, and plan managers.

Technical SEO

• Identify and resolve technical issues including indexation, crawlability, Core Web Vitals, and site performance.

• Conduct regular SEO audits using industry-standard tools.

• Collaborate with developers and the marketing team to implement technical fixes efficiently.

• Manage and optimise WordPress websites using Elementor or equivalent page builders.

Paid Ads & Performance Marketing

• Plan, launch, and optimise paid advertising campaigns across multiple platforms.

• Manage and optimise campaigns on LinkedIn Ads, Google Ads, TikTok Ads,
 Ads, and YouTube Ads.

• Conduct A/B testing on creatives, copy, and targeting strategies to improve ROI.

• Monitor ad performance metrics (CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS) and provide actionable insights.

• Align paid campaigns with SEO and content strategies for full-funnel marketing impact.

? Social Media Post & Blog Content Creation (Added Section)

• Create engaging, brand-aligned social media content across
, LinkedIn, Instagram, and TikTok.

• Research and write high-quality blog articles optimised for SEO, user intent, and AI search visibility.

• Repurpose long-form content (blogs, SEO pages, whitepapers) into short-form social posts, reels, captions, and carousels.

• Develop consistent content calendars for each brand under the Vertex Group portfolio.

• Analyse social content performance and adjust strategies based on insights and trends.

• Ensure all social and blog content aligns with NDIS-specific audience behaviour and terminology.

Data, Reporting & Performance Tracking

• Track organic and paid performance using GA4, Google Search Console, Ahrefs, SEMrush, and other tools.

• Deliver clear, actionable reports on SEO performance, ad campaigns, and content effectiveness.

• Monitor performance across both traditional search and emerging AI search channels.

Backlink & Authority Building

• Build quality backlinks through competitor analysis, outreach, and community engagement (Quora, Reddit, industry forums).

• Conduct domain authority and link quality analysis.

• Identify scalable, repeatable link acquisition opportunities.

Trends & Continuous Improvement

• Stay current with SEO, GEO, paid ads trends, and AI search developments including LLM-based search and platform shifts across Google, TikTok, and Instagram.

• Filter signal from noise — focus on high-impact changes, not every algorithm update.



? Requirements

• 2–4 years of hands-on SEO experience with a proven record of driving organic growth.

• Strong content writing skills — you can produce clear, well-structured, optimised content independently.

• Experience in social media content creation and blog writing.

• Solid understanding of on-page, off-page, and technical SEO.

• Hands-on experience managing paid ads (LinkedIn Ads, Google Ads, TikTok Ads,
 Ads, and YouTube Ads).

• Experience with WordPress content management and optimisation.

• Hands-on experience with Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, GA4, and Google Search Console.

• Familiarity with GEO and AI-driven search platforms (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews).

• Strong analytical mindset — you translate data into clear next actions.

• Fluent in written and spoken English.

• Able to work independently and manage multiple projects in a remote setting.



? Preferred Qualifications

• Knowledge of the Australian NDIS (National Disability Insurance Scheme).

• Experience in a multi-brand environment.

• Active participation in Reddit, Quora, or niche community platforms.

• Familiarity with Answer Optimisation (AO) and structured content for AI citation.

• Experience with Elementor or similar WordPress page builders.

• Understanding of local SEO, particularly within Australian markets.



? A Note on NDIS Knowledge

The NDIS sector has its own language, compliance framework, and audience behaviour. Candidates who already understand terms like Support Coordination, Plan Management, NDIS registration, and the NDIS Quality and Safeguards Commission will move faster and create more relevant content from day one. This knowledge is not mandatory — but it is a strong differentiator.
